name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Make These Liars Pay
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_these_liars_pay&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **_Are you seeing the news? The whole world is finding out what you and I have already known: that Anthony Fauci is a liar. And his tyrannical disciple, Tim Walz is right there with him. These are the people behind lockdowns, mask mandates and vaccine passports._** It's time we make them pay by Ending Emergency Powers for good! Are [**you with me**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?utm_campaign=make_these_liars_pay&utm_medium=email&utm_source=action4liberty&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_these_liars_pay&n=2)? The [revelations coming out of the Fauci emails](https://www.action4liberty.com/the_liars_and_their_destruction?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_these_liars_pay&n=3) is amazing. We've been led to believe that a Wuhan Lab leak is a right-wing conspiracy theory. Now we've learned of Fauci's connections to funding gain-of-function research at the Wuhan lab. We also know that he communicated with Zuckerberg, who has infamously used the Facebook platform to silence voices like ours. Action 4 Liberty has fought against the COVID narrative since March of 2020! We never believed these guys to start. And we certainly didn't believe they had powers to erode our Constitutional Republic. Did you know it was only 2 months ago when Governor Walz' "expert", Michael Osterholm, warned that we are in a "Category 5 hurricane" in the pandemic. He told us that the worst days are yet to come.
## WRONG!
But Walz continues listening to Fauci and Osterholm as he holds onto his Unilateral Emergency Powers now for 447 days. And he REFUSES to give them up! He wants to make his Emergency Powers PERMANENT! That means he can shut things down again, force us to wear masks again and implement a statewide COVID Vaccine Passport program. **Make no mistake about it. Fauci, Osterholm and Walz want a vaccine passport program in Minnesota!** Peter, you probably have realized this whole thing is one scam to take power away from the people and transfer it to government. There's nothing more important in politics right now than ensuring this never happens again. But yesterday, Republican Majority Leader Paul Gazelka held a press conference to [promote a bill](https://www.action4liberty.com/house_senate_republicans_change_tone_on_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_these_liars_pay&n=4) that would allow unelected bureaucrat Jan Malcolm to have emergency powers. Even the bill's author stated that the Governor would have the ability to unilaterally declare an emergency for "another pandemic, tornado or flood". That's why it's critically important that the Republican Senate puts their foot down and REFUSES to pass a Budget for Tim Walz until the Never Again Bill is passed. **But that won't happen by itself. We MUST continue to build the pressure with our doorknocking, phone calling and digital ad campaign. Please help us out.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_these_liars_pay&n=5 "DONATE NOW!") [DONATE NOW!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_these_liars_pay&n=6)
---
Now is the time to make things happen. The legislature is slated to be back on June 14th and a partial government shutdown starts on July 1st. Things are heating up!
Have they not seen what Walz did to Minnesota over the last 447 days? What issue could be more important than making sure it **Never Happens Again**?!
Don't let them sell out on us. Republicans finally have legitimate leverage to end the madness of the last year. It's time they take a stance!
We are relaunching our digital ads to let voters in their districts know what's going on in St Paul. I also just told our field team to increase the calls against these politicians. Trust me, their voters will be well informed about what's happening, as long as [**you help us out**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?utm_campaign=make_these_liars_pay&utm_medium=email&utm_source=action4liberty&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_these_liars_pay&n=7).
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_these_liars_pay&n=8)
Help us paint the picture that there is a political price to pay if they cut Deals With Democrats before the **Never Again Bill** is passed.
We mean business when it comes to Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. Action 4 Liberty has been in the trenches fighting for your liberty against this tyrannical government every day!
[**Peter, help my team make more phone calls and boost up our ads RIGHT NOW. Don't let Governor Walz hold onto his Unilateral Emergency Powers any longer! Donate $25, $50 or $100 immediately to keep the pressure on Gazelka and team.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_these_liars_pay&n=9)
Things are heating up in St Paul. Let's end these Emergency Powers once and for all!
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
**P.S. Let's make liars like Fauci and Walz pay. It's time to End Emergency Powers for good. It's time for Gazelka and Senate Republicans to put their foot down and REFUSE to pass Walz' budget until the Never Again Bill is passed.[Help us increase our phone calling campaign and purchase more ads to keep the pressure on these politicians with a donation of $25, $50 or $100 immediately!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_these_liars_pay&n=10)**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_these_liars_pay&n=11).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_these_liars_pay&n=12).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=make_these_liars_pay&n=13), software for leaders.

| STATEMENT FROM ROB ORTT CALLING ON GOVERNOR CUOMO TO EASE MASK MANDATES IN SCHOOLS
New York State Senate Republican Rob Ortt penned a letter to Governor Cuomo urging him to ease mask mandates in schools, particularly as new COVID cases are at record lows and temperatures are expected to increase dramatically next week.
"We are heading into the summer months, and with temperatures expected to soar into the 90s throughout New York State next week, it's time to ease the mask mandate in our schools. At a minimum, you should empower local school districts to make these decisions in consultation with local health officials, parents and staff. Many of our school buildings do not have air conditioning, so to require face coverings in dangerous temperatures will be detrimental not only to their physical health, but also to their ability to focus and learn."
[Read a copy of Rob Ortt's full letter to the Governor here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QtstoiGWGWQ8Cj0hfv1QhagYfcz-nf8hX6K_hNTcb-sQ2_WIOYJ3dRQ8CQCWB-VUrDxBQyY3kWqnwm6WEDKvN6QUx8gl9X4RKySG_GX6GpCn2iUh-4LGzUsF6bdTmrOd4Qc51GUcbINbzfI4-yBcwzTq2ZMqIrR29Vw8fxqAYH33tK5MwLarUih-A3fIIdu9&c=rPPL3Dmjnc01PNrwC1Ba9O1UqpmT2gh7TCsJCgtorU8qFLyzhDf9sg==&ch=5aTg48HwfDad8nRXGBTWc2oKBbjwTPHo83_eq5C0x4l9BWwNMiRCtQ==)

| | Yogi Berra, the Hall of Fame Yankee catcher said, "In theory there is no difference between theory and practice, in practice there is." Borrowing from Yogi: in theory, _of course _bipartisan solutions are preferable to party-line nonsense. **But we don't live in theory, Peter.** We live in the United States in 2021, when one political party is run by proudly ignorant extremists intent on sabotaging our democracy in a selfish power grab. They are contrary to many traditional Republicans and lying to their base. And yet, so many Washington politicians talk about compromise like it's their most noble purpose. **Here's the problem: "bipartisanship" isn't a goal. **At best, it's a means to a goal. And now that it's getting in the way of the Senate's ability to solve problems, it's an obstacle. We can't expect to "work together" with most Congressional Republicans any more than a tire can "work together" with a huge rusty nail in the road – there's just not a whole lot of common ground there. If I'm planning a trip around the world, I'm not going to negotiate the route with a guy who thinks the earth is flat. I'm not going to split the difference with a doctor who thinks that smoking is good for me. And I'm not going to Washington to compromise with people who want to sell our air and water to polluters, take away our right to vote, allow assault weapons in our schools, and deny our families access to essential health care. I'm running for Senate to _stop destructive idiots _from sinking our communities, not to help them. name: Scott Taylor
subject: Tomorrow!
body:
---
| | | | | | Thursday June 03, 2021
---
|
---
| The 82nd Delegate District in Virginia Beach Votes Tomorrow!
---
| Kathy Owens for Delegate of the 82nd district. Special election this Saturday!
"Owens, 57, is running more as a can-do outsider, though she still won the backing of some notable Republicans -- such as former U.S. Rep. Scott Taylor. As a mother, a veteran and business owner, she said there is no one better to represent those groups than her. And many of them are frustrated, she said.
"They know I'm going to go fight for them," she said."
[Click here to see the Virginian Pilot article on the race.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GxZwOhFpf8FqcpMLw1lPjmvXmDyv5rSP0kzDm8foTXR5Ss91XEmepSTPSJS2KQ2fXmtGsAi2sL1YtUSW8EyzLCzxXn6H-eM7dZw7VP1TSviLmkSgtTid__mdY5TkJ0noquCcjQFt-f7XpLQwzNp9zSWsMpGYIm6FjzioXXrRqXyQ4TwWkh9HxMvfMUyCiPRBv-W5SUV9nDJaIRZD5rFMO5C39M4RaE79XSGmoBSiDBmb7sddHg6np0lyz11MmKEIuwvcRq4DuBPe5c9iRSSXjmb_ZkYh43UgWeeJ8_tL3GY66gHKo3KuhzdlBHMshRMDL-ytYAECfyBZHUVeKVOeEr1hpmPH9Xr0mH8LvHL68mLOrhRh0TfkjgjSka081CV7&c=XfiaRcla8Lq4JpQRLmnXrw0BVbdESh-WdJ-_QRwjLKNQu4YwCGFEdQ==&ch=AO_UyWsmz7durvDMY1Rm9NQPo4NfxgwnaiP5nT3jrmHE-UFwAT_xnQ==&jrc=1)
"She was sharply critical of the location of the primary, saying "[The GOP Establishment is at it Again!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GxZwOhFpf8FqcpMLw1lPjmvXmDyv5rSP0kzDm8foTXR5Ss91XEmepSTPSJS2KQ2fDq1_ehVXVn0Aa5wIBI9EU-TwuG_FWcOILXAl4rcFWG2l4sSFOh_126-HQddA9NDkkQPI4UbNahf8sbwpYqSedu8X419kfP6zCAuSMRQGnJXsdJzdsyrVAZD2e1fCmib314aqIdHVMWDBi9OWmPhzYAHYVmd090Jn&c=XfiaRcla8Lq4JpQRLmnXrw0BVbdESh-WdJ-_QRwjLKNQu4YwCGFEdQ==&ch=AO_UyWsmz7durvDMY1Rm9NQPo4NfxgwnaiP5nT3jrmHE-UFwAT_xnQ==&jrc=1)" in a release because, in part, Tata is a member of the church that is host to the canvas. Curtis said he had no idea Tata was a member of the church when it was chosen."
That some party insiders tried to advantage one candidate over the other is disappointing and was unnessary. The location should have been central to the district, NOT at one candidate's church, on a busy June Saturday, at the oceanfront. Both are great people and may the best woman win.
If you live in the 82nd district and desire the type of Delegate Kathy would be, please don't miss the special election vote THIS Saturday, June 5th, at Galilee Church, 3928 Pacific Ave, Virginia Beach, VA 23451. 10AM-3PM
Turnout will be small, and your vote will definitely count.
Your humble servant,

---

|

Peter -
Joe Biden’s Administration started off with a bang.
President Biden and VP Harris delivered on their promise to guide America through the COVID-19 pandemic.
**And they didn’t just deliver - they surpassed all expectations.**
The American Rescue Plan completely changed our future. Joe Biden’s plan delivered billions in funding to help families get back on their feet. And now, over half of the adult population has had at least one vaccine shot — **we’re on a road to recovery that none of us could’ve predicted at the end of last year.**
But the work doesn’t stop there.
**Next up: passing the American Jobs Plan.**
**[Our working families need this plan to get through this pandemic and make it out even stronger on the other side. We need 500 signatures before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to DEMAND Congress pass the American Jobs Plan>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30250971/288954489/-1228245450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlYWQxOGY4LTNiYzUtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0XBafPg-egIQRXDJXsswtv2HPy1YiGNA8y2yowkbKsM=&emci=1877760f-e3c3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=aead18f8-3bc5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16951753)**
The American Jobs Plan will build a stronger foundation for our nation — investing $2 trillion to build back better.
And with voters across the country overwhelmingly supporting Biden’s plan, there is no good reason for Congress not to pass it. This historical plan will completely reimagine America — rebuilding America and setting workers up for success for years to come.
**[Add your name now and DEMAND Congress pass the American Jobs Plan>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30250974/288954504/-1228245450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlYWQxOGY4LTNiYzUtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0XBafPg-egIQRXDJXsswtv2HPy1YiGNA8y2yowkbKsM=&emci=1877760f-e3c3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=aead18f8-3bc5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16951753)**

name: Team Franchot
subject: We don’t want to miss you!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
We just wanted to make sure that you knew about our upcoming Weekend of Action on June 5 - 6. This weekend, we’ll be hosting a major volunteer push in your county, and we could really use your help!
Click here to sign up for our Weekend of Action. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/rHJ0UGhtQUKVSETtLBCMBA2]
It’s incredibly important that we can get as many volunteers as possible to help us reach out to voters. From phone banking, to knocking on doors, to giving our campaign a small donation, there are many ways that you can help us in the fight to secure a better future for all of Maryland’s communities.
Peter Franchot is an unprecedented candidate for these unprecedented times. He has a bold vision to create 100,000 new jobs in industries of the future, make Maryland the first net zero state in the nation, build a statewide transit system, and so much more. With your help, we can make that vision a reality!
Help us reach out to voters on June 5 - 6 by signing up today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/rHJ0UGhtQUKVSETtLBCMBA2]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
P.S. Make sure to forward this email to your friends and family too! We’re building a people-powered movement, and everyone's invited!
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em060121]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/17a6cf31-f4bf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/e58a5557-41c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNThhNTU1Ny00MWM1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ELPCMmZ0DVO1yV7OxKfLfs6Dcp1xy9x7W7V02oCaNnQ=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

subject: We’re begging
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
****Friend,

WE'RE BEGGING: WE NEED JUST ONE SEAT TO TAKE BACK THE SENATE!

If we FAIL, Democrats will pack the courts.

If we fail, Democrats will grant statehood to Washington D.C. and permanently add two far-left Senators to the Senate.

If we fail, Democrats will change the board in their favor so that Conservatives never win again.
_****_

| Peter,
The Left is trying to take control of the full national security apparatus and turn it against the American people.
This is something that should alarm us all!
The United States military must not ever become a political institution. Yet with the recent firing of a Space Force commander for speaking out against exactly that, [it's clear that we need to take serious action against the military's wokeification before it's too late!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eGNBTYblU2L-sTGzWJjPuD0sOdsxTuFuqG5Zr4IPFaaAThnYoibtTgVeTGtO1M7sbuDkb3Zd0rVdyA8ncFF0xY5w3OYb-ljUuUUztnmH7yE_jkGSRi9Zo4OyzxQIFrNkBRz7Tj2iGXGRf7o0W2fX0f9Ty1XH0TeEYPVnMLrebCOI3tQ0HZklNg==&c=ad1tlQ_eQOJjzzwBoSa4MbAWIs7da0OqJaWOCIIVjw10eYQMo3qJHw==&ch=rua_ORtmc-QV67VX-zvcG1JPYDHLruV2FbJYlppnuzqyELnBuqbxSg==&jrc=1)

| | Amy Coney Barrett, Brett Kavanaugh, and the most conservative Supreme Court we’ve seen in decades are about to decide the future of abortion rights in America, Derek.

If they have their way, we could see Roe v. Wade overturned and the end to reproductive rights as we know it. Then, protection of abortion rights will fall to the states.

**[We need to know -- do you agree that it’s important for the next Governor of Virginia to be a staunch advocate for reproductive rights? Take our survey and let us know.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30259824/288982664/-100270563?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjcwYzhiNS00YmM1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kjTmBIzgM-FonwxnYPUWj-7HoBJZUrt8gv2p-MiuDIQ=&emci=1ac80cc7-3fc5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6b70c8b5-4bc5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7540477)**

With reproductive rights under attack across the country and the Supreme Court poised to rule on the future of Roe v. Wade, let’s make sure we have a Governor we can rely on to defend our rights.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials  thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9906009/224717773/188340/10/).
clean_body: Help stop H.R. 1 today If you would prefer not to receive future emails, ** Friend, Democrats in DC are trying to ram through a law that will federalize elections and overturn election procedures that State leaders have put in place. While State Republicans have made great progress in securing our elections, it will all be destroyed by the Democrats in Congress unless we take immediate action. Mike Pompeo is right, friend: To visit our website's about page, click . If you'd like to unsubscribe from these emails, please click . To make a secure, online contribution to support our critical mission, click . You can contribute via mail at the address below. Your input is critical to our success. Send us an email with your feedback: info@rslc.gop Connect with us on and . Contributions to Republican State Leadership Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee 1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675, Washington, DC 20004. We know we’re sending a lot of emails these days. We have an aggressive fundraising goal as we roll out a robust communications plan earlier than ever before. The National Republican Congressional Committee has named Jahana a prime target for this cycle, and they doubled down on that this week with a five-figure ad buy targeting Jahana and four other Dems. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30263374/288999076/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDM0YzM1MC01NmM1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=67FnvzOnaC4IIjc9Qpj-aFfskH0zjorD7nLXc9XxCDA=&emci=38aef156-51c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9434c350-56c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15529135) | We will make this quick. We know we’re sending a lot of emails these days. We have an aggressive fundraising goal as we roll out a robust communications plan earlier than ever before. subject: Summer is Here!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
It was a busy weekend and now summer is finally underway! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470538?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Summer is Here!_** It was a busy weekend and now summer is finally underway! With the 105th running of the Indianapolis 500 taking place on Sunday, and pausing to honor our nation’s heroes on Monday, this weekend was full, but I came out of it feeling very grateful. Grateful for our country, our state and excited for what is to come throughout the rest of the summer.

This Saturday, we are excited to host a day of training for our county party officers. We’re looking forward to connecting with our county leaders at the Hendricks County Fairgrounds and sharing information and tools about campaign basics, fundraising, communications and more. We have another big event on the horizon, a week from today in fact. On Friday, June 11, we’re hosting our annual Spring Dinner. It will be great to get together with Republicans again to hear from our guest speaker former White House Press Secretary and Arkansas gubernatorial candidate Sarah Huckabee Sanders. More information on the dinner is below. Hope to see you there!

Thanks Kyle

**Photo** : _Chairman Hupfer with Lake County GOP Chairman Dan Dernulc at the Lake County Lincoln Day Dinner_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=24c130fdb9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**A Tradition Unlike Any Other**_ On Sunday, **Governor Holcomb** and **First Lady Janet Holcomb** attended the 105th running of the Greatest Spectacle in Racing! Thanks to our state's COVID response and the efforts Hoosiers have taken to get vaccinated we were able to have fans at the Speedway for this Hoosier tradition once again. Congratulations to Hélio Castroneves on his 4th Indy 500 win, he's entered historical company!

**Governor Holcomb** also joined Inari executives to break ground on the company's expanded greenhouse in West Lafayette. Indiana's calling card is agriculture and under **Governor Holcomb's** leadership, Indiana has created the best agbioscience environment in the nation. Inari's $22 million investment will also create new Hoosier jobs, with plans to create up to 129 new jobs by the end of 2023. Inari's commitment to grow in Indiana will continue to create high-quality career opportunities for Hoosiers.

_**Photos:**_ _Governor Holcomb and First Lady Janet Holcomb attend the 105th running of the Indianapolis 500_
---
|
---
| _**GOP Spring Dinner is June 11!**_
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Chairman Hupfer on WOWO_** Chairman Hupfer joined WOWO's Kayla Blakeslee to discuss Governor Holcomb's recent trip to Israel. Listen to the full interview here: [https://podcasts.federatedmedia.com/podcast/kyle-hupfer-on-gov-holcombs-latest-trip-to-israel/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fbf89cce3f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[June 11](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cd1344931c&e=1acd9bb3d6): 2021 Indiana GOP Spring Dinner
[June 16](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=442610bdc4&e=1acd9bb3d6): 31st Annual Henry County GOP Open
[June 21](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a42a0bb3c0&e=1acd9bb3d6): Jasper County GOP Golf Scramble
[July 17](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=28295bff40&e=1acd9bb3d6): Blackford County Lincoln Day Dinner
---
| |
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb** [spends time at the 105th Indy 500](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=824d7d555c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[visits Mockingbird Hill & Progress House](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=be37aa5544&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** [shares ways to ease back into the office after COVID-19](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b91d50bbd3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz **[warns of a possible scam](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5c9a20361f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Holli Sullivan **[stops in Columbus](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c5dbd662de&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Attorney General Todd Rokita** [informs Hoosiers about recalled products](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=70f6c72572&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[visits with St. Joseph County Republicans](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f3c180a7a4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun** [introduces bill to protect Americans from IRS surveillance](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f263a7dec3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[introduces IGNITE American Innovation Act](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c4619eb0c2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[compares RSC and Biden's budget](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=32854cadc9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird** [shows support for Purdue's incoming freshmen class](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=508c439540&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz** [visits Anderson University](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0945322e28&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence** [visits Muncie's VA Clinic](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=033b5bd37f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[meets with Union Health administrator to talk about COVID-19](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=03b217c0ea&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth**[remembers those we've lost on Memorial Day](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=324cef88bd&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Team Kilmer
subject: It's time to act to save lives.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Today is National Gun Violence Awareness Day and the beginning of Wear Orange Weekend.

We wear orange to honor Hadiya Pendleton, who was shot and killed in Chicago at the age of 15 -- just one week after performing at President Obama's second inaugural parade in 2013. These next few days are an important time to honor Hadiya and the countless other lives lost to gun violence and demand an end to the gun violence epidemic.

Derek is committed to doing everything he can to end the era of mass shootings and senseless gun violence tragedies. There have been too many heartbreaking moments of silence in the Halls of Congress and not nearly enough moments of action. That's why he and his colleagues in the House passed the Bipartisan Background Checks Act and the Enhanced Background Checks Act earlier this year.

**[On National Gun Violence Awareness Day, will you stand with Derek in the fight to end gun violence? Add your name to show your support for common-sense gun safety legislation»](https://act.myngp.com/el/8qF7L8JsaRb1mGDbOZZ_JR7qaMrPAYPzVLadsC-OQZo=/ecgu2O_1NSSgSh4efIN97aS7zQCV2Eg3uE3VhKidDRw=?gpsid=50_115_19230&ms=em21_210604_GunSft_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210604_GunSft_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210604_GunSft_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Curbing the gun violence epidemic might seem like an impossible task, but a future free from gun violence is possible -- we just need to fight for it. Ninety-three percent of Americans support expanding background checks. This move alone could save countless lives.

Partisan obstruction and special interest lobbying have stood in the way of essential reforms passing in the Senate. This Wear Orange Weekend, let's show that the will of the people is stronger than any political game.

**[Join Derek in the fight against gun violence and add your name next to his before Wear Orange Weekend ends.](https://act.myngp.com/el/8qF7L8JsaRb1mGDbOZZ_JR7qaMrPAYPzVLadsC-OQZo=/ecgu2O_1NSSgSh4efIN97aS7zQCV2Eg3uE3VhKidDRw=?gpsid=50_115_19230&ms=em21_210604_GunSft_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&refcode=em21_210604_GunSft_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210604_GunSft_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/8qF7L8JsaRb1mGDbOZZ_JR7qaMrPAYPzVLadsC-OQZo=/pgIm5R8xckT5fk5EhdvXhTExPKU6OaCToA_sabg5PS0=?gpsid=50_115_19231&refcode=em21_210604_GunSft_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210604_GunSft_adv_gq_act__TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)
---

Tacoma WA 98402 United States

Curbing the gun violence epidemic might seem like an impossible task, but a future free from gun violence is possible -- we just need to fight for it. Ninety-three percent of Americans support expanding background checks. This move alone could save countless lives. Partisan obstruction and special interest lobbying have stood in the way of essential reforms passing in the Senate. This Wear Orange Weekend, let's show that the will of the people is stronger than any political game. Thank you, Team Kilmer Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Alert (LeftAction)
subject: Petition: Tell Facebook to make Trump Ban Permanent
body:
Breaking: Facebook extends ban until 2023. Now it's time to take the next step.
| | | | | _Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://leftaction.salsalabs.org/fbbanstrumpuntil20231?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_
---
|
---
| | | Hi Friend, **_UPDATE: Facebook[ has extended its ban on Donald Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te8219161-e674-4456-80d0-83f7f6f485f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) until at least January 2023! Tell them to make it permanent! _**
### **[Tell Facebook: "Make Trump Ban Permanent"](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te47c6f54-bda6-4a47-8c2e-db521ee0cd89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
In breaking news, Facebook today announced that it has extended its ban on Trump until at least January 2023. This follows an earlier move, in which a Facebook advisory board temporarily held up FB’s suspension of Trump’s account, but gave the company 6 months to reverse it or clarify the time length. We should thank [Facebook for making this move (you can right here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c0f19e6-7c3c-4d72-afb3-ba2bbb1dc929/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)) but we should also tell them to take the next logical step, and make it permanent. **[Tell Facebook: "Make Trump Ban Permanent"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03fd5e9d-bf92-45fc-9267-d6b07f6e0d0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** A temporary ban is a good start, but Trump has used his account to incite violence and insurrection, and he should not have this powerful megaphone to spread his lies. **[Tell Facebook: "Make Trump Ban Permanent"](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc7ae41e3-2b36-4eaa-afd0-465adaf67584/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70ec786c-c7be-44b1-ac7d-35188746ee72/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
###
---
| | |
**Want to take action on another front? Here's a few options:**
* [List of current LeftAction actions](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8aa87768-ea2d-43ca-ac1c-a3ce23e77cac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* Want more? Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T04c94f60-413b-435e-9774-492eaa200dc6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf3801c1e-bc11-422c-bb66-c36dd398eec8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* Want to unsubscribe? Click the link at the bottom
* If you can, [make a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64cd40d3-ea28-4ac5-baa1-b6428a45fb4d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to help us cover expenses

name: Bob Dool
subject: Derek Schmidt is the right choice.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
This is Bob Dool. I wanted to take a moment to write to you today about why I'm supporting Derek Schmidt to be the next governor of Kansas. Friend, This is Bob Dool. I wanted to take a moment to write to you today about why I’m supporting Derek Schmidt to be our next Governor of Kansas. I’m a proud Kansas businessman and former treasurer of the Kansas GOP, so I know how important it is to have a leader who understands fiscal conservatism and responsibility. Derek Schmidt’s strong record as a fiscal conservative makes him the best choice to lead our state going forward. That’s exactly why I’m proud to endorse his campaign for governor. [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=6d3444aa173844a58cf202ea9f490e81&_e=kK5oqTnH3x_xLABxjsgqBha0C6eCRRXxcQgE_ViPF6gOJ0WgC43jUHy9954Q8uGIpigFDmPiv7vSpWWNhSfttV8O3Fsfs_qvYFoMyGFaJAaEPkbzRdjZYFjYwQhZyKut9UCS9HoSPGAzLOThDZetkhdM9zfwR95xPQMCINmzGk_QNt4TWs6_ExyVVLYY9XuIefAF1guD6YJ7bTeUwCrOBjPFnAZrJWmP9Rcj7hVzOWM-BwoTtVq7qvYdd8jODQhK6MlZp75au16KGATeWSjDgUZnq74EO3uWdydNSbuNa2CaZxQJm10tks_SCxuC2aevPmygcFUMfRgqITB2rjqmblYxYrILN5RrGnfH8od8gA1XhbOGbbQIWHxWadEJv0StmUnaB2JK-2G_2NsM_OFtQJEZO8Jdzb3jEHnQSo1WZrQtX3vSHs1IKIUg7hF_wvM7wnWnOj7914gn4y-vf58Wjg%3D%3D) [**You can support Derek’s campaign by chipping in here today >>>**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=6d3444aa173844a58cf202ea9f490e81&_e=kK5oqTnH3x_xLABxjsgqBha0C6eCRRXxcQgE_ViPF6gOJ0WgC43jUHy9954Q8uGIpigFDmPiv7vSpWWNhSfttV8O3Fsfs_qvYFoMyGFaJAaEPkbzRdjZYFjYwQhZyKut9UCS9HoSPGAzLOThDZetkhdM9zfwR95xPQMCINmzGk_QNt4TWs6_ExyVVLYY9XuIefAF1guD6YJ7bTeUwCrOBjPFnAZrJWmP9Rcj7hVzOWNXTVDJX49PhgybDRmyskOLFebw3Xh_yXS_HgdLeLcV-hb8ObOyl14yypqvMCGd2TQ7RNvzsWoavrASUZP3f0E2ir_XDaBpLROfw-KsFJlKSrLFE0uTMChKpnN0xgqsKlPKTnkxMk-pFP0wRcnsPqclAtHYQwquJuckgomQJDJxl_GdA0VSiK7ykNBJJeWh1hsqSCZOBBVhh24KAsqnjUZDZHild--XCv3Lmj6WzVq88g%3D%3D) As our families and businesses recover from the devastating effects of the COVID-19 pandemic, we need a pragmatic leader who understands how to get our state’s economy moving back in the right direction. I know that Derek Schmidt is the best person for the job. His conservative record of standing up for Kansas taxpayers and fighting excessive federal overreach shows that he will always do what it takes to protect our state’s values and economy. Unlike Laura Kelly, Derek won’t impose big tax increases on our families or impose regulations that make it impossible for our businesses to succeed. **Will you support Kansas’s economic future by chipping in a few dollars to support Derek’s campaign?** [**CHIP IN HERE**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=6d3444aa173844a58cf202ea9f490e81&_e=kK5oqTnH3x_xLABxjsgqBha0C6eCRRXxcQgE_ViPF6gOJ0WgC43jUHy9954Q8uGIpigFDmPiv7vSpWWNhSfttV8O3Fsfs_qvYFoMyGFaJAaEPkbzRdjZYFjYwQhZyKut9UCS9HoSPGAzLOThDZetkhdM9zfwR95xPQMCINmzGk_QNt4TWs6_ExyVVLYY9XuIefAF1guD6YJ7bTeUwCrOBt71hYh0nNCsZL9f2EQr5pDvjTU7I0vxjYWQbtNGA2WLYbaMtYFb_z3WJe3TYO59ex7beRfTlKqlaZzBoOg4uVMaqFFEUjp6kXJYMkB-H-vbsqjZG1dFy4w8NakYgXfaahzP0c9fIzdZSD7kQAlbU-09YL52SLZckQLLKfJkbNhxOATRs6jjOpvBEJUsEGtI4m8gT-kxgObpoFJxZBxPquuhzJuOsijoB82g3bpm0bVzdGFPdPN_dVthLA_phmA9Tw%3D%3D) Thank you for supporting Derek Schmidt for Governor for a better, responsible future for Kansas. ---
Like all of our county officials, judges are no different. Day in and day out they too have overcome the challenges of COVID.

I was the first Republican to be elected in Saline County since Reconstruction, but thankful I was far from the last! Eleven of us personally guaranteed the note on the permanent headquarters.

name: Sec. Ryan Zinke
subject: RE: Retake the House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Today, I'm asking you to join my team. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=130284e34e9641cd98285caa5255a20e&_e=pr6se_cv5eMDRZD3wAgAEtLkQxgenQ9p_Q_DL-BsBDX85p806PbQbULL84z8rQzDHTkJpG2DntyAKH6z1AU-Jw9ee4gN9TMoJsC8VGfez77Z3cjJ0U_Zra-aYIQFRGCdCk6AkN7BODDS9unXuauk-he8WIbxA8HhO_6EIreDiBLt8fOX1CBpSpXJAM9SwOW9ebgBP_Uyt8V2pCBAXxIlttSIPDAlAT_ykzCzZl3brDBxxUtJytikOtgaFezPbzWcEDJ6sIjmkvPeKh0J-bKl1w9xpY0IVHhGanpDz-bputLdxUbiqRBBqp4iKnXmWIyDEgnOd0u0Vw2MxJRndEfmA_I6oaPBBZra6kkCoXuCbxeX4telhENBJn9zXnp0u0RfEOpisNoExK632J7uXfgqCw%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

Before I was a Congressman or Secretary of the Interior...

**I spent 23 years as a Navy SEAL - including some of those with SEAL Team 6 - and I served as an acting commander of JSOC, the Joint Special Operations command, overseeing all special operations forces in Iraq.**

So, I know the importance of a _good team_ when going into battle.

Today, I’m asking you to _join my team_. [**Respond NOW ➔**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=130284e34e9641cd98285caa5255a20e&_e=pr6se_cv5eMDRZD3wAgAEtLkQxgenQ9p_Q_DL-BsBDX85p806PbQbULL84z8rQzDHTkJpG2DntyAKH6z1AU-Jw9ee4gN9TMoJsC8VGfez77Z3cjJ0U_Zra-aYIQFRGCdCk6AkN7BODDS9unXuauk-he8WIbxA8HhO_6EIreDiBLQdjy-b3NRxzxnz5LJiXrNiyThy78Zm4GOjn5bqk21qN2sElhKSNHTiTDRRh0S8hXjMeL7heHp5WZqtFBOqsoStsiJ9ULN_aq_ffLT9ubz3OfrLiUh9CdC5ZS0L5yUv2mOQJm5CHxKqRRtuYHQ1MfGjlA1v7Txm5Z621Bb60jMb8i0hySZLChSA-rWemLZ_n2DFbJ8C7BR6dcc1xMm6Neo5JcTw9oytSSkacHuEAHUJw%3D%3D)

I know the operation to defend our country from *Democratic Socialism* extends far past any individual role I might play on the front lines in Washington D.C., but I also know... WITHOUT YOUR HELP, WE WILL FAIL.

The radical left's infiltration has flourished with the apathy of patriots. To counter the flourishing liberal movement, we MUST retake the House...

That’s where you come in... [**Will you prove your will to join my team in this fight by following this link and contributing at least $5 or more?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=130284e34e9641cd98285caa5255a20e&_e=pr6se_cv5eMDRZD3wAgAEtLkQxgenQ9p_Q_DL-BsBDX85p806PbQbULL84z8rQzDHTkJpG2DntyAKH6z1AU-Jw9ee4gN9TMoJsC8VGfez77Z3cjJ0U_Zra-aYIQFRGCdCk6AkN7BODDS9unXuauk-he8WIbxA8HhO_6EIreDiBJZaxN_ku14R_79mSrd9bTtHgPPu2qG6wA7ijxodcuYBljIL-noR2-lnaWx46ZCwF-M9gvXCrwd8w-3wmsm0dOwj-Tpa2BCbnZ1a1iX33n5Ejg2NP_7YAMDN-aJAy1zkDW3Qh52tlvn6l8mbpt4GOIdxhCTnmXWG17XW2lQEXOy5TqWfIFM0w2BAFKCbYW-_yCAET-axwHBDZKjMA330HLgt3mmwf-W5edQAc9ci5Zoug%3D%3D)

After traveling across the world through Bosnia, Kosovo, southeast Asia, and the Middle East with or on SEAL teams - you must believe me when I say: ****America is an exceptional nation.****

We must not let Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, AOC, Chuck Schumer, and Bernie Sanders turn America into the next Venezuela.

That’s why **I’m personally reaching out to you** ... we MUST protect our country from threats both foreign and domestic. At the moment, I believe the greatest danger to our nation and continued freedom is coming from Washington D.C. and the self-interested politicians threaten both our economy and our actual physical safety.

I'm committed to this campaign for Congress. If we take no action, our American way of life will be abandoned...

Any Navy SEAL will tell you; **_you do not want to be out there when that happens._**

[**Will you stand with me NOW - before it's too late? Will you join my team and help send a Navy Seal to Congress? Follow this link to donate at least $5 to my campaign.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=130284e34e9641cd98285caa5255a20e&_e=pr6se_cv5eMDRZD3wAgAEtLkQxgenQ9p_Q_DL-BsBDX85p806PbQbULL84z8rQzDHTkJpG2DntyAKH6z1AU-Jw9ee4gN9TMoJsC8VGfez77Z3cjJ0U_Zra-aYIQFRGCdCk6AkN7BODDS9unXuauk-he8WIbxA8HhO_6EIreDiBLDkL6SAwuFcmns1w47LsRcqxUS-evjoDOcFwaab6XO3Dcwepnt4vQl2Zez7Mlx1WBPUV6fiZA2YAGF4o-b7C27-jYwkRkcQfIxzjB0KTfoOsTdP0Xv5HMxrwX_c8v5DLMGnGucxJ6Ej37hDmaWLWHWRa_0gpf-RpvuA9KezSroBtVW03szYYmm8PMEuOTOmtHF_ixbcxBMhvGh1oXB8TZxtbKdVUN0knl3N9dry9vLlg%3D%3D)

I won't stop until America is safe from her enemies.

For God and Country,

Secratary Ryan Zinke
U.S. Navy SEAL - Retired

[** Donate ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=130284e34e9641cd98285caa5255a20e&_e=pr6se_cv5eMDRZD3wAgAEtLkQxgenQ9p_Q_DL-BsBDX85p806PbQbULL84z8rQzDHTkJpG2DntyAKH6z1AU-Jw9ee4gN9TMoJsC8VGfez77Z3cjJ0U_Zra-aYIQFRGCdCk6AkN7BODDS9unXuauk-he8WIbxA8HhO_6EIreDiBI-bm-A3b6d_UZQekn-1wY5eTiyqEAqGxVhDZzAOm6d3SYCNul_M-N7KSx7fJVzv19ytZEPS_keMGPmd2CvNcBegrSowWLxDWbYh1vIABlm_hejXdM7mfAsiVgyaI_pK_E2fXUfbF3aBQMAnSPWPRIL2NLfZGdIgDZHth7Bbvj0kNN-BXA_qquFmWKR8NAJctsYvVLrLfvRhY1bQ1xrAJxSua-jrU6R6VlQu-yTiHgx3w%3D%3D)

P.S. As a Navy SEAL, I was taught the importance of values like tenacity and teamwork. [**With your help, I can win, and I won't give up until I do.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=130284e34e9641cd98285caa5255a20e&_e=pr6se_cv5eMDRZD3wAgAEtLkQxgenQ9p_Q_DL-BsBDX85p806PbQbULL84z8rQzDHTkJpG2DntyAKH6z1AU-Jw9ee4gN9TMoJsC8VGfez77Z3cjJ0U_Zra-aYIQFRGCdCk6AkN7BODDS9unXuauk-he8WIbxA8HhO_6EIreDiBII-ZEuiI4cpEqJcIAy_umQ_esytZNczg4usmiBIX6fYZBuKvZLpQLYYFXFwT1VOqtf06lq9Sd3s8C_ATTrzGt5jzjZgfFTxkQEAlJiJhsMx7H7u4pggPGqKlbH8oPBfD-lgb4KjM-89SBdAUuW9WL-e1tVLoNUfkPqYWw1JMWjyKwJBZccrZIPAr__SsvF-gc2esx-Vdxfy4ZD_CuQ6-_5bSZS4DHo46EVZo9_mQ2SnQ%3D%3D)

| | PAID FOR BY ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
---

Zinke for Congress
P.O. BOX 1597
HELENA, MT 59624

_Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD or Service Branch._

name: Team Collier
subject: National Gun Violence Awareness Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Hello team, El Paso.
Sutherland Springs.
Santa Fe High School. These aren’t just places on a map. They are eternal reminders of the sons and daughters, mothers and fathers, neighbours and friends that we have lost to gun violence here in Texas just in the last 5 years alone. **On this National Gun Violence Awareness Day, we honor the all too many victims lost to preventable gun violence. But it’s also a reminder that we have a duty to act.** Gun violence is a public health issue, and for too long self-serving politicians have refused to address the gun violence epidemic that puts Texans in danger— an issue hitting hardest among Black and brown communities. Last month, Dan Patrick passed a permitless carry bill that made it easier for people such as criminals and domestic terrorists to access guns without a permit or background check. At a time when gun violence has been surging across the state, Dan Patrick made it clear that the safety and livelihoods of Texans and of law enforcement officers were not a priority for him. **It’s past time we enact gun safety reform in Texas. clean_body: | Hello team, El Paso. Sutherland Springs. Santa Fe High School. These aren’t just places on a map. They are eternal reminders of the sons and daughters, mothers and fathers, neighbours and friends that we have lost to gun violence here in Texas just in the last 5 years alone. On this National Gun Violence Awareness Day, we honor the all too many victims lost to preventable gun violence. But it’s also a reminder that we have a duty to act. Gun violence is a public health issue, and for too long self-serving politicians have refused to address the gun violence epidemic that puts Texans in danger— an issue hitting hardest among Black and brown communities. Last month, Dan Patrick passed a permitless carry bill that made it easier for people such as criminals and domestic terrorists to access guns without a permit or background check. At a time when gun violence has been surging across the state, Dan Patrick made it clear that the safety and livelihoods of Texans and of law enforcement officers were not a priority for him. It’s past time we enact gun safety reform in Texas. Donate any amount today to show your support for electing leadership committed to passing gun safety reform over political games: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = By strengthening universal background checks, keeping guns out of domestic abusers' hands, and investing in mental health resources, we can protect second amendment rights while making our communities safer for our children and for law enforcement across Texas. Thanks for raising your voices, Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

name: Giffords.org
subject: We need your help to make up lost ground
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends — we’ll be upfront. We’re emailing you to ask for $5 to help us save lives. Let us explain.
We fell a little short of our goal for May. Nothing that will set us back, but we still need to make up for lost ground. You can bet the NRA isn’t slowing down their efforts to stop our progress so we need to make sure we have all of the resources to fight back.
We think if everyone who reads this email makes a $5 donation we’ll be able to make up for the gap in May and kick off June on a high note! So what do you say?
[**If you are able, will you make a $5 donation today to help us urge the Senate to pass universal background checks? Your support, along with others, will help us pass this bill and save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21&amount=5&refcode=em210604-1-15?t=1&refcode2=187_3935704_NKtG9_&akid=187%2E3935704%2ENKtG9_)

****
We need to show Congress the strength behind our movement to pass universal background checks.
The truth is, most of our support comes from emails like this. So if you donate $5, and the next person reading this email makes a $5 donation we’ll be in a great position to pass universal background checks in the Senate.
We’ve never been closer to getting this done, and we expect that the Senate will vote on this legislation very soon. So timing is everything right now and we can’t afford to be caught off guard.
Thank you for standing with us. Your support makes all the difference in our fight to save lives.
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?refcode=em210604-1-15&t=20&refcode2=187_3935704_NKtG9_&akid=187%2E3935704%2ENKtG9_)**

clean_body: Now is the time to DOUBLE DOWN. | Peter, This is MAJOR NEWS for our America First movement, and we can’t afford to ignore it. One of America’s TOP polling experts has announced that Republicans and Democrats are STATISTICALLY TIED in must-win battleground states ahead of next year’s elections. It’s essential that Republicans win in these states and reclaim the majority. | | | | | | In the House of Representatives, we’re SO CLOSE to a Republican Majority. And in the Senate, just A SINGLE VOTE would put us back in charge. That’s why it’s so important that we fully fund our voter contact and online outreach programs. We have to rally the Republican Grassroots so we can WIN these battleground states! | Thank you in advance for your help, Peter. Republican Polling Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Danica Roem
subject: something about Jennifer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | |
I met Jennifer as we ran for office together in 2017. We had both been told “no” -- me for trying to beat a 26-year Republican incumbent as a trans woman and her for trying to flip a Republican seat while pregnant with twins.

_That’s when I learned to never tell Jennifer “no.”_

**We both won our unlikely races: I became the first openly trans person elected to any state legislature, and Jennifer was sworn in with her baby boys in her arms.

[Now, I ask you to stand with me and support Jennifer Carroll Foy for governor. In 4 days, Virginians will vote in the Democratic primary and I’m confident Jennifer can win with your support. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-x1jyaBgfT7ravN2y1XofKpe_0fu1lYzN4wUaKDHv58XIIS8tdKfIpJya557Efd29sqEivNoeKpJ2MvRuQMHvPq5lKA4wlEBXj5bQ_FN4qW8z9Yr7N-TL_sgjrQzzO4uq9UbLYo2ybIZCQ7i1T4UOq-NjZio1pgYOP1wxd31HuBD6XQjuSJR1CRD3QSHVBSS5BCghkLEr-JQgevxbou6XC8jg2Ycn_G-L8hjfczwlOtG6k1RwujdDCFrJIly--M9VGKX4MgWeOIwex8sSDgktUkeozyi7wqNYPZVB3mX2wzw/3ch/NNG-M2vZQT-Y2jpuN3b8KA/h0/BeFtBVhRPtz9jarh2YOvw7iR12UKGmm_aGWfk7ybCNQ)**

I know Jennifer and she fights for the issues other politicians run from. When it comes to doing what’s right, she’ll never take no for an answer.

Jennifer and I share a vision for a Virginia that works for everyone. I’m eager to see all she can accomplish as governor. I know the stakes are high and we have to put the best Democrats have to offer on the ballot in November.

**[I hope you’ll join us and pitch in today to make Virginia’s future better than its past -- and make history while doing so!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-x1jyaBgfT7ravN2y1XofKpe_0fu1lYzN4wUaKDHv58VAxlHb-3ttgLE1SnhxpyZNqcXn46gusTSNid4k7c3H-gT-gY5ZumQ0K_Grfm8LiWa2PK1LdsAsmUwmDBHgR6TUii-AKeB4YhpHtipG1955mvLILrOrK1w_xFn7R9O_3W9ncSZT8Zcu8pZSk6fqHRMcIwz9IFlBiUwh7glrNoV8MN92ySbFxMk4KPC1S0P26BcGFI9U2VC4ehOaefwGVXVtjB2GcfbCvp_-aTb4sbvW7KchYJJTBJMJZV5IgKUaEZI/3ch/NNG-M2vZQT-Y2jpuN3b8KA/h1/_koCmjQva3mw8CTFSWtXbHcOO8lC15ihVD6PSmn-0tU)**

Onward,

Del. Danica Roem
D-Prince William

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_Bh73lWki93nG0RUyySk6zkTRBWLykLOh_ikrEg1x5MOg1xCgKbt-HsU4psmfPTUvipvY6nvv8WKeh_33NKGgNEhKo3Hs52t2su_VKePp8UGJzIojbTp_zdn2C8pky7UZwt7xcVnLd2Cc0fSMtPIIxc2LrQBpP6I-xk9f_2DyMQOwUVZZWbWN6IvUJ89i4dX9k0E8fXL1jgsLxK0cvwrMJRNxmge222r1yu1g3HPAM0Q/3ch/NNG-M2vZQT-Y2jpuN3b8KA/h2/4qKMHsNsJeJExPG7AXjxASyjp79F9JuI9Mni8hjW21M)**_ [CONTRIBUTE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_pXkWAZF1xX_YPR-e_nM-xsMzwmhzFMlK0z2hbrgzKa_OvYwE6Ln18IPpBL-2RNjstnJwCR9FK9hD25wjcK4eLkq9rAOPo9LJKx1Is_TNIXc9bYldJ0q721-oS8sD7IapbdGQUD9t2RD6FoLjqK7YOPVWF_zwfI64u6aH1XbFazY9r9Cm03WOr4O0-Dz8MfO3ZMXsWglWHXqtndvBVZrTnv__Rt2ELG2olOqFIoeAs9w/3ch/NNG-M2vZQT-Y2jpuN3b8KA/h3/B7Jdh8ulbjyZoNoCtLMqZI1a518-q5n5g5MRbf0s3Io) | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor

clean_body: | | | I met Jennifer as we ran for office together in 2017. We had both been told “no” -- me for trying to beat a 26-year Republican incumbent as a trans woman and her for trying to flip a Republican seat while pregnant with twins. That’s when I learned to never tell Jennifer “no.” We both won our unlikely races: I became the first openly trans person elected to any state legislature, and Jennifer was sworn in with her baby boys in her arms. I know Jennifer and she fights for the issues other politicians run from. When it comes to doing what’s right, she’ll never take no for an answer. Jennifer and I share a vision for a Virginia that works for everyone. I’m eager to see all she can accomplish as governor. I know the stakes are high and we have to put the best Democrats have to offer on the ballot in November. Onward, Del. Danica Roem D-Prince William Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities. She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor. Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. ** | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor PO Box 2306 Arlington, VA 22202 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor, please .

name: Alex Padilla
subject: I’m calling on my Republican counterparts to live up to the oath we all took when we became Senators
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends — I’ve said it once and I’ll say it again.

It’s time to put our Democracy over the filibuster.

Last month, a bipartisan majority of the House passed a bill to establish
a January 6 Commission. But before the bill even came to the Senate, Mitch
McConnell made it clear that he won’t support any bipartisan efforts to
uncover the facts behind that disastrous day.

My colleagues and I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution
of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic. And I’m
calling on my Republican counterparts to live up to that sacred duty.

So I want you to hear this from me first, and I want to make it clear as
day: I’m going to do everything I can to make sure Congress establishes a
January 6 Commission to determine the facts of what happened that day, and
to make sure it never happens again.

But right now, we have a very slim 50-50 Senate majority. If we lose a
single seat in next year’s election we will lose any hope of
accountability and the January 6 Commission will be off the table. Which
is why I have to ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21/?refcode=em210604-1-15&t=1001&refcode2=60_159979_h-4S4U&akid=60%2E159979%2Eh-4S4U ]Will you make a $3 contribution right now to help me
defend our Senate majority? If we want accountability for what happened on
January 6th we cannot afford to lose a single seat in the Senate.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210604-1-15&t=1014&refcode2=60_159979_h-4S4U&akid=60%2E159979%2Eh-4S4U ]Donate $3 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210604-1-15&t=1015&refcode2=60_159979_h-4S4U&akid=60%2E159979%2Eh-4S4U ]Donate $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210604-1-15&t=1016&refcode2=60_159979_h-4S4U&akid=60%2E159979%2Eh-4S4U ]Donate $50 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210604-1-15&t=1017&refcode2=60_159979_h-4S4U&akid=60%2E159979%2Eh-4S4U ]Donate $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210604-1-15&t=1018&refcode2=60_159979_h-4S4U&akid=60%2E159979%2Eh-4S4U ]Donate $250 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210604-1-15&t=1019&refcode2=60_159979_h-4S4U&akid=60%2E159979%2Eh-4S4U ]Other amount

This is the moment to put country over politics. On January 6th, our
nation was attacked. And now the future of our democracy is on the line.

But I know that we will get accountability for what happened on January
6th — as long as we fight together.

Thank you for standing with me in this fight,

—Alex

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.alex-padilla.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=60%2E159979%2Eh-4S4U

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: a little elbow grease
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Peter,

In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for United States Senate in Wisconsin. But first, let me explain why this request is so important.

Right now, we have a Senator in Ron Johnson who’s not only out of touch with Wisconsin -- he's out of touch with reality. He's too distracted with helping his wealthy friends or peddling dangerous conspiracy theories to focus on the issues that matter back home.

Ron Johnson has got to go, Peter. Seriously, here's a _short_ list of the most ridiculous things he has said or done just over the last few months:
* Relentlessly pushed anti-vaccine conspiracy theories;
* Deliberately obstructed survival checks and essential COVID-19 relief for working families;
* Blocked a bipartisan committee to investigate the January 6 insurrection;
* Refused efforts to raise the minimum wage to a living wage;
* Urged the governor to cut unemployment benefits;
* And that's just the tip of the iceberg!

The bottom line is this: Ron Johnson is wrong for Wisconsin. We shouldn't have to deal with six more years of his failed leadership in the Senate. That’s why I'm running to put this seat back to work for the people of our state. But if we're going to be successful, then I'll need your help to reach our extended fundraising goal before tomorrow’s deadline.

We're counting on early investments to help us fund this grassroots campaign, but we're still coming up about $2,162 short of our goal. [**Can I count on your support to push us over the edge? Help us give Ron Johnson the boot and flip this Senate seat in 2022. name: Stephen Puetz, Campaign Manager
subject: Gavin Newsom and the Hollywood elite
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
We need all hands on deck to fight back against the Hollywood elites who are supporting Newsom. Read more >>
Peter, California has a choice to make soon — whether to recall Governor Gavin Newsom, and upset the one-party bureaucracy that has broken our state, or let him stay and continue with business as usual. It should surprise absolutely no one that the Hollywood elite are aligning themselves with our corrupt governor who cares more about rubbing elbows with the rich and famous than about the hardworking men and women of California. _Paramount just donated $40,000 to Stop the Republican Recall of Governor Newsom, AND an additional $5,000 to the California Democratic party in March._ That’s just a drop in the bucket! Other Hollywood elites are pouring in MILLIONS to help him, and the only way we can counter it is by building our grassroots momentum to TAKE BACK OUR STATE. **We need 25 people to[chip in right now](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/86480d8ccc56286e/23f3835fc35f1912c3d6b838967d376c/34943) to help Kevin Faulconer and fight the flood of funds pouring in from Newsom’s elitist buddies. name: Susan Wild
subject: The 19th Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I am proud to be the first woman to represent the Lehigh Valley in Congress, and to serve alongside an historic number of women in Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30274696/289039771/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210604-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDVmYWJmYS03NmM1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYPMGhPv7MsbidEBXPkMT0mAru3jZZlGcPBjSjwLOg8=)
---
| Peter,

On today’s date in 1919, Congress passed the 19th Amendment, a Constitutional amendment to grant women the right to vote.

Today, I am proud to be the first woman to represent the Lehigh Valley in Congress, and to serve alongside an historic number of women in Congress.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30274697/289039772/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210604-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDVmYWJmYS03NmM1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYPMGhPv7MsbidEBXPkMT0mAru3jZZlGcPBjSjwLOg8=) Pennsylvania's Fab Four Women
I’m grateful for the women I serve with, and to the suffragettes who came before me and bravely fought for women’s rights. The 19th Amendment is just one example of the progress a group of dedicated individuals can make, and a reminder that our rights cannot be taken for granted. That’s the reason this famous Margaret Mead quote is appended to all emails I send: “Never doubt that a small group of thoughtful, committed citizens can change the world; indeed, it's the only thing that ever has.”

We still have work to do to ensure equality under the law for all women, particularly women of color and LGBTQ+ women. Reproductive rights continue to be under attack - far-right legislators across the country are attempting to pass hyper-restrictive legislation that take a woman’s decisions about her body and health care away from her. Women make an average 85% of what their male counterparts do, and the gap is even larger for women of color.

I am fighting every day for women to have equality under the law. But I need your help to defend my seat, and continue advocating for women.

[_**On today’s historic anniversary, can you chip in to my re-election campaign to ensure I can keep fighting for equality?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30274698/289039773/-563716641?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210604-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDVmYWJmYS03NmM1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYPMGhPv7MsbidEBXPkMT0mAru3jZZlGcPBjSjwLOg8=)

name: Christy Smith
subject: More than "thoughts and prayers"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30274826/289040065/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDllNTVjNC03N2M1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TDoMbhMbtGtas_YgOw24HShxnrpBkK-Low1y5MDsqSE=&emci=4c9e55c4-77c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4d9e55c4-77c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

Today marks Gun Violence Awareness Day -- but every day, so many face the terrible reality of mourning the lost life of a loved one. Really, every single day, we need to be aware of the impacts of gun violence -- and dedicate all that we can towards ending this epidemic.

Almost daily, we see news clips about acts of mass gun violence. We all remember watching the aftermath of Sandy Hook, of Parkland High School, of the Pulse nightclub in Orlando, of Las Vegas. **Earlier this week, a firefighter lost his life at an LA County fire station, and another was injured. This latest gun violence tragedy is another terrible reminder of how close to home these events really are.**

But those are just the most high profile instances of gun violence. Acts of gun violence happen every. single. day.

**That's why I'm beyond committed to changing the course our country is on when it comes to gun safety. It's time to pass common sense legislation to keep guns out of the hands of those who should not have them.**

**[So on this Gun Violence Awareness Day, I'm asking for you to chip in $10 or anything you can to EveryTown for Gun Safety Action Fund, a group that helps elect leaders who will pass gun control legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30274828/289040066/-1716001931?refcode=em21_210604_gvaday-s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDllNTVjNC03N2M1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TDoMbhMbtGtas_YgOw24HShxnrpBkK-Low1y5MDsqSE=)**

For far too long, politicians have offered "thoughts and prayers" to the families of victims of gun violence. That can't be the end of what they do to curb this problem.

Time and again, Congress has failed to pass meaningful gun control legislation because of roadblocks set by conservatives. They don't deny that there's an issue -- they're just too beholden to the gun lobby to do anything.

**We can't afford inaction. We can't let any more families suffer. We must do something.**

**[Gun Violence Awareness Day is a reminder of the need for action. If you agree we need leaders who will use their power to end the gun violence epidemic, make a contribution to EveryTown for Gun Safety Action Fund.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30274832/289040069/-1716001931?refcode=em21_210604_gvaday-s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDllNTVjNC03N2M1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TDoMbhMbtGtas_YgOw24HShxnrpBkK-Low1y5MDsqSE=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30274836/289040076/-1716001931?refcode=em21_210604_gvaday-s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDllNTVjNC03N2M1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TDoMbhMbtGtas_YgOw24HShxnrpBkK-Low1y5MDsqSE=) Thanks so much. Take a moment or two today to reflect and remember those lost to gun violence.

\-- Christy [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30274837/289040077/-1716001931?refcode=em21_210604_gvaday-s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDllNTVjNC03N2M1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TDoMbhMbtGtas_YgOw24HShxnrpBkK-Low1y5MDsqSE=)

name: Tom Nelson
subject: We can’t stand by and mourn the lives lost to gun violence and do nothing to prevent further loss
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Hello,

Today is National Gun Violence Awareness Day, and I am wearing orange to recognize the victims and survivors of gun violence.

We can’t stand by and mourn the lives lost to gun violence and do nothing to prevent further loss. _Just last week nine people lost their lives in San Jose._ Last month in my home county, two people were killed at the local Oneida Nation casino. **The time for only thoughts and prayers is over.**

**We need common sense gun reform.** When I am elected Senator, I will work to pass legislation that will do just that instead of letting the NRA continue to block progress.

On National Gun Violence Awareness Day, I ask you to stand with me, wear orange, and recognize that we need to do more to prevent gun violence.

Thank you,

Tom Nelson

---
|
---

clean_body: | | Hello, Today is National Gun Violence Awareness Day, and I am wearing orange to recognize the victims and survivors of gun violence. We can’t stand by and mourn the lives lost to gun violence and do nothing to prevent further loss. Just last week nine people lost their lives in San Jose. Last month in my home county, two people were killed at the local Oneida Nation casino. The time for only thoughts and prayers is over. We need common sense gun reform. When I am elected Senator, I will work to pass legislation that will do just that instead of letting the NRA continue to block progress. On National Gun Violence Awareness Day, I ask you to stand with me, wear orange, and recognize that we need to do more to prevent gun violence. Thank you, Tom Nelson | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. Today, I'm asking you to join my team.<!DOCTYPE html PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD XHTML 1.0 Transitional//EN" "http://www.w3.org/TR/xhtml1/DTD/xhtml1-transitio | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c49cb457682a4ceca839ce3581de2175&_e=2AXv4-ytgp0FhsyNb0PNO7yTFqvfgzJd4o567Npjpqs2RCh9bgU6EYOJGqH_bvG9y_5P_fog5xXYLo0MbWXSfNbGbGo6qktW5H914nLMZkPFLmeMNsDlyW3yBtawRlyTo-3Yfew3YIA10DN3D333mP3-dxQ5uGa-G_hNwBB46ZNXWA3f_Qo-dTuhRXyo-yWfwDtUTpE1cHIQfqURa2ll-S-YpNG6lmez_UoIyRE6masK8bkTHkDbuRrNMeytWRC24RUNMei_B4IfLNaNe0FT7axehBp2cczeQjRv_akL9svZknXEKeiumZ9sEpX3vF3pen1Ow2_XP1GHNTnP9fEmpAv5oiWmQ4zNrjxQE8j7D6RYbKl59iN60O2_oY9RFEQj5pELERCr7QG3hSkdySRpIw%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Before I was a Congressman or Secretary of the Interior...

**I spent 23 years as a Navy SEAL - including some of those with SEAL Team 6 - and I served as an acting commander of JSOC, the Joint Special Operations command, overseeing all special operations forces in Iraq.**

So, I know the importance of a _good team_ when going into battle.

Today, I’m asking you to _join my team_. [**Respond NOW ➔**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c49cb457682a4ceca839ce3581de2175&_e=2AXv4-ytgp0FhsyNb0PNO7yTFqvfgzJd4o567Npjpqs2RCh9bgU6EYOJGqH_bvG9y_5P_fog5xXYLo0MbWXSfNbGbGo6qktW5H914nLMZkPFLmeMNsDlyW3yBtawRlyTo-3Yfew3YIA10DN3D333mP3-dxQ5uGa-G_hNwBB46ZM8CvdImIYG6JvrShoM2U_J1yumJx_ZhyANuK2siLg8UsNmKvbi3OFpy5IgKY3iimpDrR1wug3sxiUH57rqRFDnXrUfcZ33aJC-HoI2dK5rGESPPGTknbJOB4_jvh3M__v4ZWX_ZDL0YB16-4W011v5hR9chPzGtF8KR802rwdrUu0tmhsje6jJo_LPBJ3TP5M2B9mTQMNJ-Lfjqxm3gpBTekSUqoKs-oKJ2q6Yzh5ttw%3D%3D)

I know the operation to defend our country from *Democratic Socialism* extends far past any individual role I might play on the front lines in Washington D.C., but I also know... WITHOUT YOUR HELP, WE WILL FAIL.

The radical left's infiltration has flourished with the apathy of patriots. To counter the flourishing liberal movement, we MUST retake the House...

That’s where you come in... [**Will you prove your will to join my team in this fight by following this link and contributing at least $5 or more?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c49cb457682a4ceca839ce3581de2175&_e=2AXv4-ytgp0FhsyNb0PNO7yTFqvfgzJd4o567Npjpqs2RCh9bgU6EYOJGqH_bvG9y_5P_fog5xXYLo0MbWXSfNbGbGo6qktW5H914nLMZkPFLmeMNsDlyW3yBtawRlyTo-3Yfew3YIA10DN3D333mP3-dxQ5uGa-G_hNwBB46ZN2lfrSQ_-eAp2IveeEDZg--jmQvL0HcTF2WHOmgQ3C3hAbD20FXPmn5I-FozEcFNFVlELKzo4LMw-zlZZovyR-h6-LI0Q9EZLGtoYg9RlwOi03Y4_RgFyBipMQQwm54jc5WafFdupHOCDVpvNWX9fxkJ98qS7aoYC_Yv_ZNOd2kJUEOfKhIciHzdB7aP1kdNhTKncUVpR_W2PezszSRCd8eAtNSEp7tWb_3pNfdJn0eA%3D%3D)

After traveling across the world through Bosnia, Kosovo, southeast Asia, and the Middle East with or on SEAL teams - you must believe me when I say: ****America is an exceptional nation.****

We must not let Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, AOC, Chuck Schumer, and Bernie Sanders turn America into the next Venezuela.

That’s why **I’m personally reaching out to you** ... we MUST protect our country from threats both foreign and domestic. At the moment, I believe the greatest danger to our nation and continued freedom is coming from Washington D.C. and the self-interested politicians threaten both our economy and our actual physical safety.

I'm committed to this campaign for Congress. If we take no action, our American way of life will be abandoned...

Any Navy SEAL will tell you; **_you do not want to be out there when that happens._**

[**Will you stand with me NOW - before it's too late? Will you join my team and help send a Navy Seal to Congress? Follow this link to donate at least $5 to my campaign.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c49cb457682a4ceca839ce3581de2175&_e=2AXv4-ytgp0FhsyNb0PNO7yTFqvfgzJd4o567Npjpqs2RCh9bgU6EYOJGqH_bvG9y_5P_fog5xXYLo0MbWXSfNbGbGo6qktW5H914nLMZkPFLmeMNsDlyW3yBtawRlyTo-3Yfew3YIA10DN3D333mP3-dxQ5uGa-G_hNwBB46ZNjbzfdqWTYkjq5uXHcksAvlfen0abAkzu7wRkfJSRWcQM54eGpvTZAv6XLVHVb6cv_sTzkw0Fc7FQ_QnQpAGadE-vybh7onn63ias859fGODttza014YePKL2z4-klQkkVs4nD12jFXnpc_gmPvxxqBb64g0lqedoeytHF8jJqCwyiu50cl_jPkSCCg0OjWIeLm7iTyzxna2o_xh__K6-jxnkNoDSfhg9M-fx0z-_zQA%3D%3D)

I won't stop until America is safe from her enemies.

For God and Country,

Secratary Ryan Zinke
U.S. Navy SEAL - Retired

[** Donate ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c49cb457682a4ceca839ce3581de2175&_e=2AXv4-ytgp0FhsyNb0PNO7yTFqvfgzJd4o567Npjpqs2RCh9bgU6EYOJGqH_bvG9y_5P_fog5xXYLo0MbWXSfNbGbGo6qktW5H914nLMZkPFLmeMNsDlyW3yBtawRlyTo-3Yfew3YIA10DN3D333mP3-dxQ5uGa-G_hNwBB46ZN-ZSrZ9Dps2oI_6ule8C6wRzgtNjB-MvM9PHmqIA3rnfr4LPav4O5m7i3DgoisVQdKND8F-9JlkR3WA9dsINJBiiFthPGI8EiFaNcTipmdFtHwqNd1j0Eyi68Y6uM9FiK_8TiYOuMhKM5_xw3pSz0sAEUs2vjjgxPlnrHml_c1ygkUDmc-ozHBx1DJoo4-bqCPw3Hg-4GjrrxOSbriVOOHn9X8NpoRsN8Zokii21MYYw%3D%3D)

P.S. As a Navy SEAL, I was taught the importance of values like tenacity and teamwork. [**With your help, I can win, and I won't give up until I do.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c49cb457682a4ceca839ce3581de2175&_e=2AXv4-ytgp0FhsyNb0PNO7yTFqvfgzJd4o567Npjpqs2RCh9bgU6EYOJGqH_bvG9y_5P_fog5xXYLo0MbWXSfNbGbGo6qktW5H914nLMZkPFLmeMNsDlyW3yBtawRlyTo-3Yfew3YIA10DN3D333mP3-dxQ5uGa-G_hNwBB46ZORLfX_YbjpHBiO7q8-3DXtrXT4Gsq3bPet_wtbqUNMKqzFduVe2KENpFlVBH9vWITL-t3R3zfXh7m6QkOHtqWmRwvuS0Lfcz3Y0ABUnQzUmKBHZGk4gB7wij7QnPKEL14qpKS3JQZip5ElotVfSygBWf6IsmDurxND8bikXS1qSvGdnR1t04dqVIpAp1QnP-5r9BE5DxSn2jIKh9ItRwdiDcNV8QVcUTKnn15u4VYuww%3D%3D)

name: Erica Smith
subject: re: 100 counties, 100 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I could not be more excited.
#
Hi, it’s Erica with a HUGE campaign update.
**Our 100 Counties in 100 Days Tour officially launches today!!!** This is our campaign’s first-ever statewide tour, and a critical opportunity to connect with North Carolina voters in _every single_ county. I could not be more excited, y'all.
Visiting all 100 North Carolina counties in just 100 days will require an ambitious schedule, teamwork, and faith. And let’s be real: It’s going to take a LOT of money to pull this off.
[**_Will you please chip in your very first donation of $5 so that we can kick off the 100 Counties in 100 Days Tour with enough resources to connect with voters in every North Carolina county? Every dollar you send our way helps feed our volunteers, publish ads about the tour, and put gas in the campaign van._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2178?refcode=em20210604-140&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=140%2E3698%2EjvagDt)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2178?refcode=em20210604-140&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=140%2E3698%2EjvagDt)**
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2178?refcode=em20210604-140&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=140%2E3698%2EjvagDt)
I've said repeatedly that this campaign is about leaving no one behind and showing up everywhere. I meant that. **Everyone is worthy of being seen, fought for, and represented.** That’s why I’m _literally_ going to every single county in North Carolina!!!
From our mountains to our coastal communities, to our big cities and small rural towns, I will show up for every voter. I will let them know that there's room for them in politics, and in our moral movement for a North Carolina that works for all of us.
We’re kicking off our tour today so that we can put in all this good work over the summer. Remember, we’re up against the Democratic establishment _and_ the GOP, so there’s no time to lose.
[**_If you’re in a place to do so, please chip in your very first donation of $5 so that we can kick off the 100 Counties in 100 Days Tour with enough resources to connect with voters in every single North Carolina county._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2178?refcode=em20210604-140&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=140%2E3698%2EjvagDt)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210604-140-footer&t=23&refcode2=140_3698_jvagDt&akid=140%2E3698%2EjvagDt)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
