clean_body: I could not be more excited. Hi, it’s Erica with a HUGE campaign update. Our 100 Counties in 100 Days Tour officially launches today!!! This is our campaign’s first-ever statewide tour, and a critical opportunity to connect with North Carolina voters in every single county. I could not be more excited, y'all. Visiting all 100 North Carolina counties in just 100 days will require an ambitious schedule, teamwork, and faith. And let’s be real: It’s going to take a LOT of money to pull this off. I've said repeatedly that this campaign is about leaving no one behind and showing up everywhere. I meant that. Everyone is worthy of being seen, fought for, and represented. That’s why I’m literally going to every single county in North Carolina!!! From our mountains to our coastal communities, to our big cities and small rural towns, I will show up for every voter. I will let them know that there's room for them in politics, and in our moral movement for a North Carolina that works for all of us. We’re kicking off our tour today so that we can put in all this good work over the summer. Remember, we’re up against the Democratic establishment and the GOP, so there’s no time to lose. Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Erica Erica Smith for U.S. Senate Email us: mailto: info@ericaforus.com

name: Team Bass
subject: Do you have time for a quick question?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Pop quiz, friend.

There are three statements below. Can you point out the accurate statement?

**Which of the following statements is TRUE?** A.) Karen Bass is a leader in the fight to get the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act signed into law.
B.) Currently, there is no national standard for policing, meaning the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act would be the FIRST of its kind.
C.) President Joe Biden called on Congress to move the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act to his desk for a signature without delay.
D.) All of the above statements are true.
| [CHECK YOUR ANSWER](https://act.myngp.com/el/XrplGgGGrZY8QlaHH-QgOZcTsgXGwGYJY5_N--ddGsY=/rIc-LN5wF1rqy4_kkzfiBUU4qE4kvhd1ovTn_ZadHps=?gpsid=39_132_19213&ms=em21_210604_jipa_engg_gq_act_qz_tb_ettx&refcode=em21_210604_jipa_engg_gq_act_qz_tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210604_jipa_engg_gq_act_qz_tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Passing the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act is history in the making, and we're curious to see what you think, team. We'll be tracking the links to see what you know about this historic bill.

Vote for A, B, C, or D above, **[or just click this link to see the right answer without voting.](https://act.myngp.com/el/XrplGgGGrZY8QlaHH-QgOZcTsgXGwGYJY5_N--ddGsY=/rIc-LN5wF1rqy4_kkzfiBUU4qE4kvhd1ovTn_ZadHps=?gpsid=39_132_19213&ms=em21_210604_jipa_engg_gq_act_qz_tb_ettx&refcode=em21_210604_jipa_engg_gq_act_qz_tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210604_jipa_engg_gq_act_qz_tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

The American people have made it clear that we will NOT move on until our policing system is reformed to ensure accountability and justice for all. Karen is grateful to have you by her side in this important work, and we look forward to seeing your answers!

subject: Before Trump takes the stage in North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30275436/289042530/2005830277?refcode=20210604_TM_Trump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzUyOTRhYy03OWM1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VuQ3p7ZnS8bVWEFBMDqHHhLf4pSdft6gdIk2xB_UdYM=) Friend—Yep, you read that correctly. Donald Trump is rebooting his divisive rallies and headlining the North Carolina GOP convention tomorrow. It’s being promoted as a “presidential address,” just in case it’s not clear what Trump is up to here. Last week, Trump’s disgraced former national security adviser explicitly called for a military coup to put Trump back in the office he lost in 2020. This week, news outlets across the country reported that Trump has been telling people he expects to be _reinstated as president by August!_ It’s strange and more than a little bit pathetic. But worse, it’s incredibly dangerous to democracy for Trump to continue sowing doubt in our electoral process and spreading ridiculous lies that become parroted by right-wing media. **Still, a majority of the Republican Party stands with Trump and are willing to trade their integrity for political points. And many of them are running for Congress in 2022.** The stakes are sky-high next November. If Republicans win the midterms, Trump will own Congress and the Biden Administration will be obstructed at every turn. Worse yet, if Republicans control Congress heading into the next presidential election, they may succeed where the Capitol Insurrection failed and throw out a legitimate Democratic victory. The radical left are coming for Florida and they want to change our way of life.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Add your name: It’s time to abolish the filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
We can’t let Republicans block our progress. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30278087/289050658/-272948131?refcode=MTH_em_20210604_X_ENG_FR_X_ACT_US_all_all_FR_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTk3ZmZmNi04MWM1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ln9trW6t6Coz4wnkKvf801uu4NGZeMu469_Yy2uQwX4=&emci=f497fff6-81c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f597fff6-81c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
Hello, Here’s the deal: We’ve got to abolish the filibuster. Even though Democrats have the Senate majority, we can’t yet use it to pass bills that would help New Mexico’s workers and families. And it’s all because of an antiquated Senate rule that requires 60 votes to end debate on a bill and move it to the floor for a vote. **The Republican _minority_ is abusing this rule to stop Democrats from passing critical legislation, including the bipartisan commission to investigate the insurrection on our Capitol on January 6th.** [**I was elected to make a real difference for New Mexicans, but the filibuster is getting in the way. So, please join me in calling for an end to the filibuster by signing the petition:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30278088/289050659/-1200460382?refcode=MTH_em_20210604_X_ENG_FR_X_ACT_US_all_all_FR_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTk3ZmZmNi04MWM1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ln9trW6t6Coz4wnkKvf801uu4NGZeMu469_Yy2uQwX4=&emci=f497fff6-81c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f597fff6-81c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045) | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30278089/289050660/-1200460382?refcode=MTH_em_20210604_X_ENG_FR_X_ACT_US_all_all_FR_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTk3ZmZmNi04MWM1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ln9trW6t6Coz4wnkKvf801uu4NGZeMu469_Yy2uQwX4=&emci=f497fff6-81c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f597fff6-81c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
The filibuster is the only tool Republicans have to block our progress and delay bills like the _For the People Act_ , which is scheduled to be voted on this month and would set a national standard for voting rights — preventing states from enacting racist voter suppression laws like the ones advancing in Republican state legislatures across the country.
On top of that, Mitch McConnell has vowed to stop our progress at every turn and will undoubtedly use the filibuster to stop Democrats from moving forward legislation to take on climate change, expand workers’ rights, raise the minimum wage, and create millions of clean energy jobs.
[**That’s why we must abolish the filibuster once and for all. clean_body: We can’t let Republicans block our progress. Hello, Here’s the deal: We’ve got to abolish the filibuster. Even though Democrats have the Senate majority, we can’t yet use it to pass bills that would help New Mexico’s workers and families. And it’s all because of an antiquated Senate rule that requires 60 votes to end debate on a bill and move it to the floor for a vote. The Republican minority is abusing this rule to stop Democrats from passing critical legislation, including the bipartisan commission to investigate the insurrection on our Capitol on January 6th. | The filibuster is the only tool Republicans have to block our progress and delay bills like the For the People Act , which is scheduled to be voted on this month and would set a national standard for voting rights — preventing states from enacting racist voter suppression laws like the ones advancing in Republican state legislatures across the country. On top of that, Mitch McConnell has vowed to stop our progress at every turn and will undoubtedly use the filibuster to stop Democrats from moving forward legislation to take on climate change, expand workers’ rights, raise the minimum wage, and create millions of clean energy jobs. name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Not what we wanted to see
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
End the filibuster and deliver voting rights, infrastructure, and more.
#
Peter, voters across America delivered Democrats the House, Senate, and White House. Now, Democrats need to pass our legislative agenda without the right-wing GOP. Yet, President Biden and some Democrats are giving Republicans power.
First, President Biden is wasting valuable time by negotiating with Republicans on a critical infrastructure package even after every single one of them voted AGAINST survival checks and the American Rescue Plan. Then, two Democratic Senators — Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema — said they don’t want to pass a historic voting rights bill without Republican support even as Republicans suppress the vote in states across America. And now, we’re learning this about Sen. Manchin:
| **Garrett Haake** @GarrettHaake
---|---
| | | Just wrapped an interview w/ @Sen_JoeManchin in Morgantown. He REALLY isn’t interested in doing an infrastructure bill w/ only Democratic support. Repeatedly says he thinks there will be a bipartisan deal between @POTUS & @SenCapito \- and he’s not ready for reconciliation if not
---
If we’re going to pass urgent, necessary, and popular legislation to expand voting rights, protect our elections, invest in critical infrastructure spending, expand Medicare, guarantee child care and paid leave, and take bold action on climate change, **Democrats must move forward immediately, end the filibuster, and pass these critical measures WITHOUT Republicans.**
[**We need to move past endless negotiations with Republican obstructionists and pass our legislative agenda for the people. These bills are just too important to wait another moment. Chip in $3 or more today to fuel Pramila’s fight to end the filibuster and pass critical pieces of legislation, including the For The People Act and a robust infrastructure package.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210604?refcode=em20210604-345&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=345_420207_jXRKdx&akid=345%2E420207%2EjXRKdx)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210604?refcode=em20210604-345&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=345_420207_jXRKdx&akid=345%2E420207%2EjXRKdx)**
If we don’t end the filibuster right away, our democracy will only face greater threats and millions of people in need will only continue to suffer during this economic crisis. We have some BIG obstacles in our way, but we can get this critical work done together.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210604-345-footer&t=22&refcode2=345_420207_jXRKdx&akid=345%2E420207%2EjXRKdx)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=345%2E420207%2EjXRKdx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=345%2E420207%2EjXRKdx)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Right now, the Senate has the possibility to pass the Equality Act, amazing legislation that grants the LGBTQ+ community protection under the Civil Rights Act.

If passed, this will mean:

● LGBTQ+ people cannot be fired because of whom they love or their gender
● Businesses cannot refuse LGBTQ+ people service or employment on the basis of sexual preference
● Critical economic sectors -- like housing, education, health care, and more! -- will not be able to discriminate against the LGBTQ+ community.

Passing the Equality Act will be a huge step forward in our progressive movement towards true equality and justice for all.

[We have a moral obligation to do whatever it takes to sign the Equality Act into law. So please, add your name immediately and DEMAND that the Senate pass the Equality Act!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30279626/289055203/895619302?refcode=PAFC_20210604_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTMwNTk5OC04OGM1LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2r7lHnvxkcjVG4NPIQBeDZKG3r-OYDh40oc2dCgWp4I=&emci=4b04a7cc-41c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=2e305998-88c5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1755436)

We’re about to enter GOTV weekend. In case you don’t know, that stands for Get Out the Vote.

This is the final moment to mobilize voters and turn them out for Tuesday’s primary.

**I know my message is resonating with Virginians. Now the challenge is expanding my reach in the final days.[That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Donate now to expand our reach with our GOTV Fund.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-t-S-sN7ch-3c5cn2glx8oJSENjXww_nne38tvqiRIOeVgMiAXFOyiF9OJPrGhVImRTVIOto_HaC6PccKWh2DdOQVS3egXd1EX5bgMvUJuySrYO-0dtgHxzhVGarSFWsinxOtGj2e5vmJJaDN_K3XAgi9Z0XyYoCbY0zRqd6HoJMYSHH62dBtUMVLmOYteLhbEgJnI3ghZqOx9iPnoyQRY9dzl9CRxtD4gAQgiw2TcdNIdeBqMIccJgfu5TSSfoFVkpbt9VtFHnYLfzF1NFAE7QbJGEueS0imoCq66IXsmgw/3ch/tzgzpDevQNKx_IGXHxxIFw/h0/nOQetG8cyWo2QNBjDW-7KSWLx98SAk851j1My0NNPv0)**

We need to elect someone who can bring bold, transformational change to Virginia; who will inspire a working mom to stand in line at her polling place to cast her ballot; who doesn’t just have a record of solving Virginia’s challenges in the legislature, but who has actually lived through them.

I have lived on minimum wage -- which is why, as Delegate, I fought hard for (and passed) raising the minimum wage.

I have lived without healthcare, and many of my loved ones have, too. It’s why I’m proud that we expanded Medicaid to over 500,000 Virginians.

My family has been hit hard by this pandemic, just as many working families across Virginia have. It’s why I’m the right leader to build a stronger post-COVID economy for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected.

**With your help and support, we can and will elect new leadership for our state and we will make history by electing the first Black woman to serve as governor nationwide.[Donate now and power my campaign through our GOTV weekend.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-t-S-sN7ch-3c5cn2glx8oJSENjXww_nne38tvqiRIOeVgMiAXFOyiF9OJPrGhVImsZTrOMLkkyl5zAC3txK1jV-YCx_3SQs4L6VNIhV6RHd2Sbx-l--QJPd4BYLlTTroP9JaD29VH99WltLNC6TcZRVoWeU_XU8eouIUK3b_iyU-tc-yRQKbfR35SGbm6Upo6lsp3UHDB-G9UcPHnj1PLBZSH0_9sgS-LRrllhFJ8mf9oBEkR59bvWiVBFE2aP4wmidNntUOigkQlMPolSKYGnCI6A60JWTu1PfzYM311jg/3ch/tzgzpDevQNKx_IGXHxxIFw/h1/LGDRKyLr4Asa2bxdVsKOabd7BKHeY0v1Ubat3bd_stY) **

Who are these children? Where are they coming from? Where are their parents? And have they been tested for COVID? I [called](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=605f01d986a94b3d8b1f5d38c9cf903e&_e=GIDiXWpldyvFZf0gxHML3rirRVfp4LdKGjdosxQddBzHkLlYXqDZ2_HoWRN8-qyXmxFdYZ_mVOzm9cTaygJR6NO5hDDhUlsmnAafV7ggcBSbpDfZAVV9g4Xu80w9UQ5KAniQ0UtYXlXR9oiHQQPu7RGf85NTZ2A_e0Vcg5RycCRRSfp-LoLaSj8tfT3c_DGxmDR9B17kWVVJ1LQ0kRwl-eWYwilOyepDyaODgg5GpgeWlNcgBAaNH6l2DVpfJEVPLUQJk6jQXIrugNfWidhVQWFD2Jo39VrsL0b2Jaf4dJW28irGkZmM3wGiFfaHVslFiiLWXSKUKLUJoH711qiDSBskBnU_pqejeY4P9-Fs9iMfLE5ioBxYMiPrNJTmVO4xv71xZBAzHFCUuk9R4KeIgQ%3D%3D) on the Biden administration to be transparent, but answers are few and far between. Records show the flight [originated](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=605f01d986a94b3d8b1f5d38c9cf903e&_e=GIDiXWpldyvFZf0gxHML3nZgetuj1i5aD_tt1QxXcFABZsNK2FdWShsbETVvscVUrjNz2rN9WgNQPZiIUk6JFpn5ft7XpoLAmBPNft6xHjz3GSQtQ5tFc-UqbLtgj1JQM-DwxZAOnzIYX5x1o2u7oiIVTu-1A85546WC7mnd1CGOO4R_wEIlL-vQdNckMoUd1M7iq_3jZpnjJcZ6r_--gFcgq3O6rLCwQki8ZBY3OyfMtTo-qIkSs5e82LF75E3Ukujja7yCd6sbSydFVoDW4KjuuaJWFQJrWAptdaM8U3yxaaB2-1GzjQNHBUaJ5awUXNX42lF6PNKPm1VlIPEF5wTsVlcYIZcwOUsP2_-s9b5Z6yJQJ87ZsUVKpmP5HldhV2oJptJ88pWawNkfvuxQog%3D%3D) in Long Beach, California, and local news captured video of migrant children boarding the plane. The Department of Health and Human Services handles the relocation and travel of migrant children, but [wouldn’t](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=605f01d986a94b3d8b1f5d38c9cf903e&_e=GIDiXWpldyvFZf0gxHML3nZgetuj1i5aD_tt1QxXcFABZsNK2FdWShsbETVvscVUrjNz2rN9WgNQPZiIUk6JFpn5ft7XpoLAmBPNft6xHjz3GSQtQ5tFc-UqbLtgj1JQM-DwxZAOnzIYX5x1o2u7oiIVTu-1A85546WC7mnd1CExsyqH8mjI_rw2D_Bb-UX0yc9Q1wuoIU3_Dp3I19fzmWuLQ_S9ALj39WslKkzhbAI-D_1aUc1OeO0vppO75YBD3a-7sq-ehagXNGFrRrpskp5IzdX1CZcbxt7gE3TFUX3tuiO2rygriKCuUgfVuaiZNbAUkCoOVNC74foQHYmeBq7a23SehMEa1YXmK6jgfa-HdwxYgsmbhseyGSpI97q_3Ah7V6Ra-z6AEVWi2moBBA%3D%3D) confirm the nature of this particular flight. Biden’s dangerous immigration policies created the current border crisis, and now every state in America is becoming a border state. When will Joe Biden own his failures and answer the tough questions? We’re waiting. | |

**Happy Birthday Tennessee 🎂
**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=605f01d986a94b3d8b1f5d38c9cf903e&_e=GIDiXWpldyvFZf0gxHML3ksXtY5poZ9-uzWXGpl-GAEsqCeyL34bgT7QHwelX3DnM6QKTpAK_wfy7bAt4NjD94z3xkF8TpdExePdABfHW4oSrT77J0YOGBSkwEaItjoQ0lBMLgbM6aKlkXRZ1NjHRLCwsmb-mRJHFHjm5co996vnH7-lA15E9Q9e54CG6JMZnr35c24M53_18Xq54TGtfiu5kgt1xzSytRKO62rsb2s6cJwLFf1vrtGIQuzVzVTBDGMvGIifAUugJ56TmRaAwPH7lasKZH_Z8ryXwdfkT9n3tmtobe53oNhv3_pmgYplTLo7pkA8afrO8sf0NBweklGRVBnLGSYyEZDNySrVydi1Gbu2IPBo7r51AC0n5P8eJhybJ63lKgov3z6eWpsQxJMMjdg1o_5wCw2I3fNb1jKVWdiQXNAghCmmJ7fZ7BO-)

Happy birthday Tennessee! This week our great state celebrated its 225th birthday. I joined the celebrations at [Blount Mansion](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=605f01d986a94b3d8b1f5d38c9cf903e&_e=GIDiXWpldyvFZf0gxHML3iCXiHobQ5h-p8oo79_vHjZz_38WbNnlqmu8kL1Tvggue-2myFWs9Wfbv4PNxMbNaGf1EWWBdkEGWPuU8a3O-2ur4PzxmbOpqKbhsGkaIXjBBv-uaM3X9CXPzpdvfhknWtLw9B-Tosg-O0T8ogmRSyFRTsQX88ulSg2eU8IPi3IFgrLanq9MMsxfQkJI7ySq7hhq8qd9IpWlzxDYaM4bVQpiz9VJ9G0DK_l8AW_MgQn3tHM9RDOzO4zl6KAJ71gl_A%3D%3D), AKA the birthplace of Tennessee. I’m pictured here with a proud Tennessee boy dressed up as William Blount, the Southwest Territory’s first and only governor and a signer of the U.S. Constitution. Blount played a pivotal role in Tennessee becoming the 16th state.

**Ever wondered where our state got its nickname?** “The Volunteer State” was coined during the War of 1812 thanks to the thousands of Tennessee volunteer soldiers who played a prominent role. Our reputation for service was reinforced during the Mexican War when the secretary of state asked for 2,800 Tennessee volunteers and got 30,000 respondents.

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: paid for by higher taxes
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, A short work week didn't slow down Jane as the campaign made some major moves this week that continue to position Jane as the grassroots, America First candidate that will win this race. Impressive new polling, huge voter contact numbers, continued emphasis on combating Critical Race Theory, and more, Jane is working non-stop to be your next United States Senator. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **New Polling Shows Jane in Position to WIN** This week, the campaign released new internal polling showing Jane's tremendous growth on the ballot since launching her campaign in February. In just 100 days, Jane has gained nearly 20 points on the ballot. Additionally, she has a 2-1 advantage over Josh Mandel among voters with an opinion of both candidates. In other words, the more voters learn about Jane, the more they like her and want to vote for her. On the full field ballot, Jane has gained 14 points, while other candidates are either flatlining or declining. Her favorability continues to improve, she has significantly raised her name ID, and is the only candidate converting the outreach she is doing across the state to actual votes. These trends are in our favor, and it's clear that Jane's America First message is resonating with voters across the state and Ohioans are coalescing around her campaign. Jane is out-working every candidate in this race and this polling is proof that it's working. You can read more [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=ddc3aa83cae6469c9d2ecc1364e6bc45&_e=XnJGhGZFVnAzlSqwtxXoUFrzzAKW2sx6STokfVdYOUaC05g6YNvmEcmE53DnqcI337OSTC2pf3Dc6X2G-dsVMsVn3WENUAcOcY-DFX1WozjqC_tcLATQ_xOHXS9PIzHv7bt8W9f2QvISx4bHZl-UCVcJqLJd4WpXi8hX8AzRpzMERtCG3X0iDhUCPoqlIajeHCXIPmsOBjPJAXgCE-GVfgintAFkU4-MwCogoJXCeZYOSj7vjhNX2xNf275v5SbrxTLo1exnW25g-XQNvkSbbL5_eym4wYVk8enwc08p4v9DeEN2XxKZ2kON7ONREq9PvEcHwAZQ0X9Hp7K0dCNmR2L993zqa9eoIuvAtRfVPTJ-5bhOpZRX-gVyr2QM6EOR) and [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=ddc3aa83cae6469c9d2ecc1364e6bc45&_e=XnJGhGZFVnAzlSqwtxXoUH0E2rkWwj7QKytBBgAXObBqiTisw-2FVMOWk1OEfwgQcZRhfG1cQDlZ7Ixz_AndD4JvonSx4jty123ONZkB8USeWb8FpdIaIqQxcBCxV_zBtBeqPUuxW5tmPB7i5zfsc25i8O5LiRNt_BU2-XvxPrPI8KG-MI1lAtidsXmvcj3OxqYySKigWJlpVrkyQk9SCzOmYl4aEGg1C4S2VGsh2oqFHJT5GnvGosgoTArzyqilMt7VbOyQlGRRtT0mOlqfynZ-bsWreMjEeT8W6mIMDbOOklEzXOstaMO_xeZwrJV1rggv66-jZuh_y4ruIZnSZIucZqE1w23hlerkWdEmtnl-04gKNVZO6otR0oldqJma). **First in the Field** Speaking of out-working other candidates, this week, Jane announced that our first-in-the-field grassroots ground game has surpassed 100,000 voter contacts! Our team of staff, interns and volunteers are out talking to Ohioans every day about Jane's America First agenda, and the response we are getting at the doors and on the phones has been extremely receptive and enthusiastic. No other candidate has a significant ground game presence like Jane does, and this will continue to give her an edge in the race. **Leading the Way on Critical Race Theory** Jane continues to be recognized as a leader in exposing the dangers of Critical Race Theory and the left's cultural revolution in our education institutions. This week, Jane continued her statewide listening tour talking to parents and students in Cincinnati. Jane was interviewed by [One America News Network](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=ddc3aa83cae6469c9d2ecc1364e6bc45&_e=XnJGhGZFVnAzlSqwtxXoULz42tUJqOF2lfRJFrnkhu86nX3pHHkniAPTswPHm3aSSf4QckadbX7MM7jxE21yRCP2nwbYRh_R0Udp4bS3qrLNSaoGJtVWZ0ZUSEjFO3sgJzYMYAteGFaNspVvX2ZkbrLHsvhvy8hJJL6egg8X4ynuAGeX8WFPPjmBP3pLmhvZc11x5GDLkjN2kyhWpv9izIao53NShNF-9Gmhpldbtt7_ge6mvq5ON0i1uzTQGCCMwbdhM5Ev7u_CdIaUaNfyz3rhRxEs28RXu37PnBCPw-YrRqZZnWbtTSsKYQ-oNumC75U-7gB4WH8dMxtAVxqvlTnyiGmSrowr9C9aoPWd9Gs%3D) and [Spectrum News](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=ddc3aa83cae6469c9d2ecc1364e6bc45&_e=XnJGhGZFVnAzlSqwtxXoUH0E2rkWwj7QKytBBgAXObCWxVLK3z0KVGH5eMZ75-H9roM7yWlIJgA_Rr-30rca9uWk1IXt6qqwOm_27FF6KEccX2fQHkrVgwRnpwHtZXCI_oESOBQp61SjXKUyyfshMwc5gGZnOMR9F-ocCJUhMYKdWamCLCxmTkQLyheX04Wc8wJ5s5r_TGo1s85Fk0HmbaPnM2kno4NqI0LHbyRRlabnzTTK6ivBq7K7bXsxP8egL2bPybwGsOrex1ljh57nkz_RFW8CqjjHLEQG8JkNtMyoTOr3W7UuZnVZ8rojFuLutvca3F4u7JUI5M0PsB1Xbb4EM314X6DZSkdq6W3TCk7iSmlrPOeJ1O9deWPWW5P2) about her tour and what she has been hearing from parents across the state. [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=ddc3aa83cae6469c9d2ecc1364e6bc45&_e=XnJGhGZFVnAzlSqwtxXoULz42tUJqOF2lfRJFrnkhu86nX3pHHkniAPTswPHm3aSSf4QckadbX7MM7jxE21yRCP2nwbYRh_R0Udp4bS3qrLNSaoGJtVWZ0ZUSEjFO3sgKwH6JP88CDbiDzfX8rcfcTukJbcjK8bQSmieP9J_gfURRAx0BfTeWjeOcbDFoSxcTs45Gy6yHg_hAmeGCr1UCIUmmU9SEsEwCm9si6a1_3FjwKNbeg5DqJyzxOqDBjj0HlXidSiehACn7QgoYvbTuL9qj2kgwIHOMlfJXQGMnFRbvZinxyopj44D2zGfShR0CWdoL3X4hMnew-mdBMDG1bWHeQSbrGtjFvxi8yKMkF0%3D) **"Critical Race Theory seeks to divide us, it is a marxist ideology and its part of the left’s socialist agenda," Timken said.** [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=ddc3aa83cae6469c9d2ecc1364e6bc45&_e=XnJGhGZFVnAzlSqwtxXoUH0E2rkWwj7QKytBBgAXObCWxVLK3z0KVGH5eMZ75-H9roM7yWlIJgA_Rr-30rca9uWk1IXt6qqwOm_27FF6KEccX2fQHkrVgwRnpwHtZXCI_oESOBQp61SjXKUyyfshMwc5gGZnOMR9F-ocCJUhMYImlAR8W64TfphqOSgKklTyB8eDO4RfPKBwBF1dXCHG513Ux6_GnDLCES6WjnTy3nJW1R5prudrVjVm-kPJHeMv3kmDBK7njFmIF7V3jXERAcvZTxtNCiqQt2nEbl4fh5CV5oKmdTDiCyTcjOujDL5jU8Gg4gW1sykWb3L-vh39awGquvz9KeLrdyRSwReuaWCR30lkhgWGLOBLD1smzGVN) **“It's really, to me, an issue about the future of our country,” Timken said.** Jane also launched a new statewide radio buy on conservative stations across Ohio about this divisive ideology. You can listen to it [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=ddc3aa83cae6469c9d2ecc1364e6bc45&_e=XnJGhGZFVnAzlSqwtxXoUD-6h3vYakhR2XYnI19SogXSbZwuaoggVfTjmypD0K77NwDuFMWv4frzW6w6hJOZPRRI7mLRvSobA7gpGEx-mRm3lXNqTjLs87XgfcEpScraiyUHSbr2k5c9vWKEF16nooyr3htInJqrOtit7q2QAbp6B3wSU9kT4ToD2WmL6-LSqiizNpoIMrWxd3T-JHWGiAEWlgdBjoA53p2KQMgewugroKCrNGThjFp9STWHhR8EDdCOSrxwV85_enF7aOX42kxz3_HglnNVvtcaYA0q5ZQ%3D). **"As your next Senator, I will fight for you, your family and your children’s right to an education that celebrates the greatness and values of America."** **More of Biden's Disastrous Policies** Joe Biden continues to undo all of the great progress we saw under President Trump and strong Republican policies. This week, Biden formally ended the "Remain in Mexico" policy that was highly effective in combating illegal immigration, his budget proposal reverses a decades long ban on taxpayer-funded abortion - something he himself used to be against, and his bad policies continue to suffocate the economy. For the second month in a row, today's Jobs Report showed underwhelming growth and less jobs than anticipated, despite the economy opening up as a result of the historic efforts of Operation Warp Speed. Even more telling, the labor participation rate fell, proving that Democrats' policies of paying people not to work are backfiring. Who would have thought? (all of us). There is a workforce crisis in this country, inflation is soaring, gas prices are up, and the middle class will feel the brunt of Biden's $6 trillion in spending proposals paid for by higher taxes. Biden continues to cave to his radical base on pivotal issues like abortion and the border. It's more clear than ever that we must take back the Senate to stop these disastrous policies and return to America First policies that were working for Ohio and this country. Jane is working every day to make sure that happens. Thanks for reading, and have a great weekend! Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_s=ddc3aa83cae6469c9d2ecc1364e6bc45&_t=BYkrYPCugOMej1lj-kBwEJ_p2_K_U5WbeQu2GG0JNfdX0fxxzgBm0LCIHPBdxPmOrm3hg4_UcB_GgBtDJiQBFGiOVY9_2AVT0N56iXeysqC7-0eatdW1m95DPJJXLuoAzrw1LPLSUqLhqHx65blSBYwJRKzcVQfYD3KU6jeBZv4%3D) | | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=ddc3aa83cae6469c9d2ecc1364e6bc45&_e=XnJGhGZFVnAzlSqwtxXoULo8Z2nGmnot8Oa4tsfzVBv9qSqKzmPY5xSgOODEU9Xb8EMhiLn4blAsLM48QLumyekkxvct6z_IvFzXFZ5DVzk31wCOvQbdNnX4dblXcvpC_5xRb7y4OBcN8BCMyN3zJQxxwpBakJr13Fnm1CEQ6BQUnfrQAU-VPBmg0JYsAkvgd_xCuVG09hNpvLcGkx3nKcsAP2jk-IOreLNx7YRTf7lIuCtg6VbXQPJoqvqQy-owdFV5JTS8yCWL_7KEpEepWTEyqFcN0kwCpCtgDnHJbJk%3D) | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=ddc3aa83cae6469c9d2ecc1364e6bc45&_e=rDN2uRqVcsP-YfhocW5iFTLDDpsSd1Bpd_EJk8uM4EWOJnXy67bzE_Fo2_qw-sEu5cKAzOgSS4ZIi8eU_Pen37ilGsjEWSicnu4peImt1EWbk6se7QUWqw4W04h_9S0IJWNhepNaBq25hcy9wH1F3CgVm3gCHm5JXigHyX5lLJyKtFWniAZojh0YL0s8tgEMVgu9m24CfpQrTB-IFoxaWf05xfJ9AmWJqQYDzeWP2lZgKO0ebCVckffq_Dvc8r2Pu9vlPcWKFUhF1pusAlPknA%3D%3D)

**Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Candidate Chris Lins - Bow/Dunbarton Special Election _****_NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans **
---
|
---
| **Dear ****Derek,**

**We are just finishing the first week of June and Republican leaders across the state have already made strong strides for the state of New Hampshire.

Americans across the country of all political ideologies are frightened and disheartened by the radical agenda of the Biden administration. His actions (or lack thereof) have proven to be critically damaging, and we must continue to advocate against his irrational policies for the sake of New Hampshire residents. This is why House members have taken important steps to protect our state against such impositions from the Federal government. Read the “Official House Update” for more details on these measures.

I would also like to congratulate the Hillsborough County Republican Committee for their fantastic event featuring Vice President Mike Pence last evening. It was wonderful to see so many active Republicans supporting our values in one venue, and this just goes to show how energized we are heading into the 2022 election cycle.

Next week several towns are hosting local elections, and this Tuesday is the Bow/Dunbarton special election for Chris Lins. I encourage you to assist us in ensuring his successful election by reminding your family and friends to get involved, and more importantly, to vote! Check out our section on Candidate Chris Lins with information on how to aid in his campaign.**

**Have a wonderful weekend! **

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

**House Passes Set of Bills Prohibiting Federal Government Overreach**

Bedford,Bedford, NH- House Majority Leader Jason Osborne (R-Auburn) released the following statement in response to the NH House passing two bills aimed at prohibiting government overreach at the federal level, and protecting states’ rights. SB154, prohibiting the state from enforcing a Presidential Executive Order that restricts or regulates the right of the people to keep and bear arms, passed on a vote of 199-177. SB89, adopting omnibus legislation relative to election procedures, passed on a vote of 200-174.

“Since President Biden and the Democrats took control of Washington, there have been numerous threats on states’ rights and citizens’ basic rights. Something must be done, and the New Hampshire legislature is making sure that our basic freedoms are going to remain protected. The federal laws and executive orders being discussed in Washington relative to firearms would severely restrict our basic Second Amendment rights and are completely inconsistent with New Hampshire’s laws and traditions. We are one of the safest states in the nation, and our current laws are fine the way they are.”

“At the same time, HR1/S1 being discussed in the Senate would have a severe impact on the way New Hampshire conducts our elections. We are proud of the way our elections are run here, and the passage of HR1/S1 would only increase voter uneasiness at the polls. The state should maintain control over our elections to maintain the integrity of the process. I am disappointed, but not surprised, that our federal delegation has been conned by the Democrat party machine into supporting this ‘malarkey.’”

“The Democrats’ rallying cry is that the passage of these bills is unconstitutional. I would say protecting our state laws is completely within our right. What is unconstitutional is the blatant stomping on the US Constitution just so one political party can take complete control over our basic freedoms and our elections. We have seen that movie before, and we know how it ends.” **
**

| **_Senate Republican Update_**
---
| |
---
| | **Senate passes a balanced budget serving all of****New Hampshire!**

---
| On a vote of 14-9, Senate Republicans led the way, passing a new budget for FY22-FY23 today that is balanced, fiscally conservative and serves all of New Hampshire. The $13.5B spending plan also lowers property taxes for homeowners, seniors and Main Street businesses, while at the same time, makes significant investments in local communities, education and mental health.

Senate President Chuck Morse (R-Salem) said, “I am proud of this budget. It works for all of New Hampshire by prioritizing our most vulnerable populations and providing relief to every New Hampshire taxpayer. Republicans believe the most responsible budgets are built on reliable revenues, lower taxes and fiscal discipline which is exactly how we built this one. Our goal is always to be the very best stewards of our taxpayer’s money as possible, and this new budget strongly reflects that governing philosophy.”

_**Highlights of the Senate budget include: **_**

Taxpayers
**
* **Provides property tax relief to every New Hampshire homeowner**
* **Lowers taxes on New Hampshire’s small businesses**
* **Phases out Interest & Dividends Tax to help seniors and the disabled**

**
Property Taxes
**
* **Sends $100M directly back to property taxpayers**
* **Sends an additional $188M from Meals & Rooms revenue back to cities and towns for property tax relief – an increase of $50.5M over the last budget**
* **For the first time, puts 30% of revenues from the Meals & Rooms Tax into a dedicated Trust Fund for distribution to cities and towns**

**
Small Business
**
* **Cuts business taxes (BET and BPT) and increases threshold for BET filing**
* **Reduces Meals & Rooms Tax for first time in decades**
* **Exempts Paycheck Protection Program(PPP) loans from state taxation**

**
Public Safety
**
* **Makes investments in Granite Shield, which continues to work on drug trafficking interdiction aimed at preventing the supply of illegal drugs from entering NH**
* **Funds the Commission on Law Enforcement Accountability, Community, and Transparency recommendations for body cameras, which reduce complaints filed against police officers and provide evidence when an incident occurs**
* **Provides $500,000 for Internet Crimes Against Children Fund**

**
Education
**
* **Creates Education Freedom Accounts to give low-income New Hampshire families more choices for their children’s education**
* **Corrects education funding formula to ensure schools are not hurt by COVID enrollment drop, providing $67M in additional aid**
* **Provides $30M for school Building Aid**
* **Reserves $35M in Education Relief Aid for schools most in need**
* **Fund’s Governor’s Scholarship Fund**
* **Increases funding to towns that expand to full-day Kindergarten**

**
Protecting our Environment
**
* **Provides $15.6M for state aid grants to keep our water clean**
* **Consolidates Public Utilities Commission and Office of Strategic Initiative into a new Department of Energy to guide energy policy decisions such as development of offshore wind power**

**
Substance Misuse
**
* **Continues to build on the progress made in combating the opioid crisis**
* **Provides over $100M in funding to address substance abuse **

**
Mental Health
**
* **Fully funds new forensic psychiatric hospital to free up beds at the NH Hospital and transfer patients from the secure psychiatric unit at the state prison**
* **Funds transitional beds to reduce emergency room mental health boarding crisis**
* **Provides $8M for community mental health programs and mobile crisis teams**
* **Fully funds the Developmentally Disabled Wait List**
* **Provides $3M to help veterans and seniors recover from social isolation of the COVID-19 pandemic.**

**
Seniors
**
* **Eliminates Interest & Dividends Tax on retirement savings**
* **Increases funding for Senior Support Services**
* **Provides $1.5M to help seniors recover from social isolation of the COVID-19 pandemic.**

**
Capital Budget
**
* **Funds state projects all across NH**
* **Leverages $25M in additional federal funds to address more projects, reducing future costs **

**
Veterans
**
* **Increases funding for Veterans Support Services**
* **Creates National Guard Enlistment Incentive Program**
* **Provides $1.5M to help veterans recover from social isolation of the COVID-19 pandemic.**

**
Affordable Housing
**
* **Adds $25M to the Affordable Housing Fund, leveraging an estimated $300M in additional private investment**
* **Continues current affordable housing funds through Real Estate Transfer Tax**
* **Provides $100 million in direct tax relief for property taxpayers**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: I just stormed the stage . . .
body:
My heart is still pounding from confronting Jack Dorsey at a Bitcoin conference today in Florida.
| | | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/892Al8f5tKJVKPCXz83lnN4A/98sShR2MGtkQdIRXknizRg) | Patriot,

My heart is still pounding from confronting Jack Dorsey at the Bitcoin2021 Conference today in Miami, Florida.

The Twitter CEO casually sat back in his orange shirt on a big white chair and had the gall to speak about "decentralization" as his company continues to maintain a centralized grasp over online speech and digital payment processors.

As a large security guard grabbed me and pushed me back, I yelled, "Censorship is a Human Rights violation!"

[**Watch here and support my work.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/892Al8f5tKJVKPCXz83lnN4A/98sShR2MGtkQdIRXknizRg)
[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/892Al8f5tKJVKPCXz83lnN4A/98sShR2MGtkQdIRXknizRg)
We can't give the Big Tech Tyrants an inch in public or in the courts as they give us nothing.

Millions of Americans, including myself and President Donald Trump, have had their voices silenced online because of Jack Dorsey's policies, and this will continue until the Big Tech Tyrants are shunned or sued into lasting change.

[**Help me keep going by funding my work here.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/892Al8f5tKJVKPCXz83lnN4A/98sShR2MGtkQdIRXknizRg)

**Help me keep fighting!

Together, we will #StoptheBias!**

[**Donate today.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/892Al8f5tKJVKPCXz83lnN4A/98sShR2MGtkQdIRXknizRg)

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. BTW, ironically after confronting Dorsey at a Crypto conference that was supposed to be about "free speech and decentralization", I was kicked out! [**Help me keep fighting by donating here.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/892Al8f5tKJVKPCXz83lnN4A/98sShR2MGtkQdIRXknizRg)

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Add your name to support free community college
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Peter,
As a former community college instructor in Washington state, I've seen up close and personal the incredible impact that community colleges and technical schools can have.
It's so important to me that students have every opportunity to thrive and succeed in school and that means making sure it's affordable and accessible for everyone.
I'm working to guarantee two years of community college or trade school for every American to help ensure students have pathways to higher education and careers.
**[Are you with me, Peter? Sign on to support free community college for all.](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a693014/22080b68/797ff24e/46023100/3469409567/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://murraysenate.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-free-community-college-for-all?source=em210604_639&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter")**
This is a big, bold step we can take right away to help put higher education in reach for more Americans. The costs of higher education are out of control -- and urgent action is necessary. Students should not be forced to drown themselves with debt in order to pursue their dreams.
My legislation, the America's College Promise Act, will guarantee students two years of tuition-free access to community or technical colleges, or two years of tuition at historically Black colleges or minority-serving institutions. Let's get this done to help all of our students succeed.
**[It's time to make community college free. Add your name if I can count on your support.](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a693014/22080b68/797ff24e/46023100/3469409567/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://murraysenate.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-free-community-college-for-all?source=em210604_639&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter")**
Thank you,
Patty

**[Sign the Petition](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a693014/22080b68/797ff24e/46023100/3469409567/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://murraysenate.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-free-community-college-for-all?source=em210604_639&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter")**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a693014/22080b68/797ff24e/46023107/3469409567/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values: [donate now](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a693014/22080b68/797ff24e/46023106/3469409567/VEsD/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").

subject: My heart is still racing . . .

I don't think I've seen another candidate for Congress or member of Congress rush a stage in front of thousands of people to put a Big Tech Billionaire on notice.

Patriot,

I don't think I've seen another candidate for Congress or member of Congress rush a stage in front of thousands of people to put a Big Tech Billionaire on notice.

But that's exactly what I just did at the Bitcoin2021 Conference in Miami, Florida.

[**Watch here.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/8qBZnTn3fvUg21QVnP892GOA/NalRarH5oIdyfrCeFTaQTg)

Millions of Americans, including myself and President Donald Trump, have been silenced by Twitter CEO Jack Dorsey, and that will never change until he and the rest of the Big Tech Tyrants are forced to change.

Laura Loomer

Sisolak’s desk!**_ **__**[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/rW9N2Xa6Bn__GLW25vFu5pjPE8ScA0FyjnAhqrT4GyLGgo9djuTiu5Lfdpqej-rs640YpLOWOV0RPJNprX9tI2Cc9P_RhduRHF04pPLgGzxTpqO3zAdpxKANSmuSsnA8xj1Z3jvkPFtkgkbwS-wmJJV6XfgYK44NLAHnDmITRRKSlNR14flSGyENG3FVXAeSs1m45LrgN81vgZtqQc3Iwbb8g2b_UohxVNL9TXa-_FN5QoZ1nDJrmdtt1uh1WeTgd8v9SyYOXR_rL5ErHAm2MA/3ch/0_Ae7-wzSraUZhGCoGC_Cw/h2/3UxOOeYyr6dfkBCmp6eV4Vit3ZFIiqF5QITupa6gYz0) | | | [ADD YOUR NAME TO SHOW SUPPORT →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/rW9N2Xa6Bn__GLW25vFu5pjPE8ScA0FyjnAhqrT4GyLGgo9djuTiu5Lfdpqej-rs640YpLOWOV0RPJNprX9tI1VaGTyrKbwQpIfKg9K1r7xAEeUvBl3sNfshbQ8QIAJyozA9Kh_RspAnPe1gSh_6h6EbTg1dvqxGOqSryqsrPWzo1koOPx2xBPXUnNu0maAHrP2m7_Y3Tz9vsslbsch-j6r2Ri35fAK6PxCi9X3xTUpXVOTeP8zFj_YfaD03t3HidYoGeA7HCK1rE2vYbH840A/3ch/0_Ae7-wzSraUZhGCoGC_Cw/h3/JXKNNuCFM8cK1tvVUXS99ZZKTruhxQN5AlCS5z_sato)

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/rW9N2Xa6Bn__GLW25vFu5pjPE8ScA0FyjnAhqrT4GyJZsFFopDh74g2eMS7ecgAx-HCoAlruGfSeyeE7o8OE1_VsK5Uy3L6pbPG_8Xr7_Cc14OcrXPx6jQSCRVw6eaRNd1QnH0wYZ9nYBGtd865IxdwWtSsetocIrJgluGM6tpSEsXDn6foYaXE9K5paeJPnhPT0JblKfpVm3vhjXng4AIC6jGepD1loQ8uRPsCA5jY-CECroE1bXvbCaydlbVIl19H5cZx7myfNmpgcqOayIg/3ch/0_Ae7-wzSraUZhGCoGC_Cw/h4/RfNIujeMMDf4Afxls_BdA2gXJXbzgZs1zLgOfAUzmV4)
This proposal would offer a public, entirely optional health care plan to all Nevadans -- and if signed, Nevada will be one of the first states to pass this landmark legislation.
The goal is to**provide affordable, good-quality coverage** to those who either can’t afford private health insurance plans, or who don’t qualify because of things like preexisting conditions.
If we’ve learned one thing from this past year it’s that we _desperately_ need to improve our health insurance and health care systems.
**We are thrilled that our leaders here in Nevada are taking this issue seriously** — and this proposal is a MAJOR step toward ensuring health care access for all Nevadans.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Clean Elections Court Victory!
body:
COVID Docs Uncovered

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SEEKS INJUNCTION AGAINST CHICAGO MAYOR LIGHTFOOT’S
RACIST INTERVIEW POLICY

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=25090&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1uNnNqcjNmZ2FuWSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYwNDIzNDIzMQ==]

Judicial Watch attorneys this week filed a motion for preliminary
injunction
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=25061&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdGVuYWNjaS1ldC1hbC12LWxpZ2h0Zm9vdC1vcHBvLTAyODUyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYwNDIzNDIzMQ==]
to immediately prevent Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot from denying Daily
Caller News Foundation reporter Thomas Catenacci’s interview request
on the basis of race.

The lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=25062&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbGlnaHRmb290X2NvbXBsYWludC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MDQyMzQyMzE=]
was initially filed on May 27, 2021, in the United States District
Court for the Northern District of Illinois, Eastern Division
(_Catenacci et al v. Lightfoot_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=24999&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdGVuYWNjaS1ldC1hbC12LWxpZ2h0Zm9vdC1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDI4NTIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjA0MjM0MjMx]
(No. 1:21-cv-02852)). Christine Svenson of Svenson Law Offices in
Chicago, Illinois, is assisting Judicial Watch with the lawsuit.

Judicial Watch details in the motion that:

Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot is only granting interviews to
“journalists of color” to mark the two-year anniversary of her
inauguration. Plaintiff Thomas Catenacci, a White journalist for the
Daily Caller News Foundation, requested an interview of Mayor
Lightfoot on her two-year anniversary. To date, almost two weeks after
Plaintiffs’ request and despite two follow-up emails, Mayor
Lightfoot has not agreed to an interview with Catenacci, apparently
due to the mayor’s “journalists of color” only interview policy.
The mayor’s refusal to be interviewed by Catenacci violates
Plaintiffs’ First Amendment rights and Catenacci’s right to equal
protection. Plaintiffs move for a preliminary injunction to prevent
further, irreparable harm.
On May 18, 2021, Mayor Lightfoot’s office informed multiple
reporters that she would grant one-on-one interviews, “only to Black
or Brown journalists
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=24997&F=T&
The next day, the mayor released a letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=24998&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21heW9yLWxpZ2h0Zm9vdC1qb3VybmFsaXN0cy0yMDIxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYwNDIzNDIzMQ==]
doubling down on her discriminatory policy. Since that time, the Mayor
has granted at least one interview request from a self-identified
Latino reporter and none to white reporters.

We sued after Catenacci, a white male, emailed Mayor Lightfoot’s
office requesting a one-on-one interview with the Mayor. The office
never replied to the request or to two additional follow up emails
from Catenacci.

The lawsuit alleges Mayor Lightfoot purposefully discriminated against
Catenacci, “because of his race by stating that she would only grant
interview requests from ‘journalists of color’....”

“There is no excuse for racial discrimination. Every day that goes
by without the Mayor granting my interview request because of my race
violates my rights and tramples on the First Amendment,” said Thomas
Catenacci.

Neil Patel, Daily Caller News Foundation president said: “It's
bonkers that we had to file this lawsuit. Chicago's mayor should not
be discriminating against journalists based on their color. That's
something that every normal American understands.”

Immediate court action is necessary to stop Mayor Lightfoot’s racist
policy.

Mayor Lightfoot is not above the law.

A hearing has been set by the court for Monday morning so we should
have news soon!

JUDICIAL WATCH LAWSUIT FOR ACCESS TO ILLINOIS VOTER ROLL DATA CAN
PROCEED

A federal court ruled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=25091&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2lsbGlub2lzLXZvdGVyLXJvbGxzLW9yZGVyLTA1NTQyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYwNDIzNDIzMQ==]
our lawsuit can proceed against Illinois officials for denying public
access to Illinois’ voter registration database.

We filed the lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=20594&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaWxsaW5vaXMtcmVmdXNlcy12b3Rlci1yb2xsLWRhdGEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjA0MjM0MjMx]
on behalf of the Illinois Conservative Union (ICU) and three of its
officers, Carol Davis, Janet Shaw, and Loretta Savee, after Illinois
state officials refused to allow them to obtain a copy of the
state’s voter registration database despite their lawful request for
it under federal law (_Illinois Conservative Union et al v. Illinois
et al. _
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=20614&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2lsbGlub2lzLWNvbnNlcnZhdGl2ZS11bmlvbi1ldC1hbC12LWlsbGlub2lzLWV0LWFsLWNvbXBsYWludC0wNTU0Mi9dKE5vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjA0MjM0MjMx.
1:20-cv-05542)).

The National Voter Registration Act of 1993
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=435&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvY3J0L25hdGlvbmFsLXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi1hY3QtMTk5My1udnJhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjA0MjM0MjMx]
(NVRA) provides that states “shall make available for public
inspection and, where available, photocopying at a reasonable cost,
all records concerning the implementation of programs and activities
conducted for the purpose of ensuring the accuracy and currency of
official lists of eligible voters.”

When members of the ICU sought access to Illinois’ voter list,
however, they were outrageously told they must view the database one
record at a time, on a single computer screen, during “normal
business hours,” at the State Board of Elections office in
Springfield, Illinois, which is 200 miles from where they live. There
are over 8 million voter registrations in Illinois. We argued that
Illinois’ arbitrary restrictions “make a mockery” of federal
law, “as much as a requirement that Plaintiffs wear blindfolds.”

United States District Court Judge Sara L. Ellis ruled that
“Plaintiffs have plausibly alleged that” Illinois law “conflicts
with” and “and frustrates the NVRA’s purpose of providing voter
information to the public to help ensure the accuracy and currency of
voter registration rolls.” She also allowed a claim to proceed under
the Equal Protection Clause of the Fourteenth Amendment, on the ground
that political committees in Illinois can access copies of the voter
registration database while ordinary citizens cannot.

The claims will proceed against Illinois’ chief state elections
official, Bernadette Matthews, the Acting Executive Director of the
Illinois State Board of Elections. The Court directed further briefing
on whether NVRA claims can proceed against the Board itself and the
State of Illinois under the doctrine of sovereign immunity.

Dirty voter rolls can mean dirty elections – which is one reason why
federal law requires access to voting rolls. This court ruling further
affirms that Illinois voters and citizens have a right to review
election rolls under federal law. Illinois’ stubborn and unlawful
refusal to make them available suggests the state knows the rolls are
a mess.

Judicial Watch is a national leader for cleaner elections.

In 2020, we sued North Carolina
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=18485&F=T&],
Pennsylvania
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=18726&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3Vlcy1wYS12b3RpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjA0MjM0MjMx],
and
Colorado
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=20868&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY28tdm90ZXItcm9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjA0MjM0MjMx]
for
failing to clean their voter rolls.

In 2018, the Supreme Court upheld a voter-roll cleanup program that
resulted from a Judicial Watch settlement of a federal lawsuit with
Ohio
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=17110&F=T&].
California settled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=15011&F=T&]
a federal lawsuit with us and in 2019 began the process of removing up
to 1.6 million inactive names from Los Angeles County’s voter rolls.

Kentucky
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=17111&F=T&]
also began a cleanup of hundreds of thousands of old registrations
after it entered into a consent decree to end another Judicial Watch
lawsuit. In September of last year, the U.S. District Court for the
Eastern District of Kentucky agreed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=21662&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvancta3ktc2Vjc3RhdGUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjA0MjM0MjMx]
to
extend the consent decree through 2025 after finding that that
Kentucky’s former Democrat Secretary of State Alison Lundergan
Grimes breached its terms
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=15012&F=T&]
by delaying sending out voter notices, which allowed the names of
people who have died or moved away to remain on the Commonwealth’s
voter rolls.

In October 2020, we released a study
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=20909&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbmV3LWp3LXN0dWR5LXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MDQyMzQyMzE=]
that found 353 counties nationwide that had more voter registrations
than citizens old enough to vote, i.e., counties where registration

Judicial Watch Attorney Robert Popper is the director of Judicial
Watch’s election integrity initiative. We are being assisted in
Chicago by Stephen F. Boulton of Anthony J. Peraica & Associates, Ltd.

In a December 4, 2020, email to colleagues, Gordon forwards the
results of a survey conducted of Michiganders taken from November 20
– December 1 focusing on COVID-19 vaccines and tells them there are
“big challenges ahead.”

* There is significant reluctance toward COVID-19 vaccine adoption,
with 66% saying they are likely to get a COVID-19 vaccine, but only
43% “very likely”
* Attitudes toward the COVID-19 vaccine vary widely by demographic
group, with more men saying they are “very likely” to get the
vaccine (51%) than women (35%)
* Age is a key factor in how likely someone is to get the vaccine,
with over 62% of respondents 65+ reporting that they are “very
likely” to get the vaccine (higher than younger age groups)
* There are also striking differences in vaccine adoption by race,
with white respondents far more likely to say they are “very
likely” (47%) to get the vaccine than are black respondents (25%)

Gordon responds positively to Emanuel after Samotin reaches out to
him, saying “Please give me a call.” Samotin then sends Gordon a
“concept memo” on Applecart and what it does. Gordon forwards the
email exchange and concept paper on to Whitmer’s chief legal
counsel, Mark Totten, and others, saying, “I think the PR and ad
partners could be key for raising our game.”

The memo labeled “CONFIDENTIAL: NOT FOR DISTRIBUTION,” promotes
Appleacart:

[A] leading NYC-based data science company that builds dense,
accurate, and actionable maps of real-world relationships between
individuals using publicly available data and a proprietary Social
Graph platform. Applecart’s Social Graph catalogues more than 25
billion social relationships between 250M+ Americans.

***

To assist in the efforts to combat COVID-19, Applecart can use its
Social Graph to generate high-value custom advertising audiences
comprised of people who have personal or professional relationships
with major company executives or state and local government officials.
These audiences can be targeted with either a) the latest information
about the actions that companies and governments must take to prevent
the spread of Coronavirus or b) negative news stories that criticize
the companies and governments for their inaction, in order to spur
action.

***

Applecart can work to counter the threat of harmful misinformation by
generating custom audiences comprised of the personal and professional
networks surrounding key local and national reporters, editors, news
producers, and other influential decision makers in media. Using these
audiences, those fighting to stop the spread of Coronavirus can
promote the latest public health information or pushback on widespread
misinformation to the networks surrounding members of the media. This
approach will ensure the high visibility of accurate information about
how to prevent the spread of virus and will counter misinformation
within the networks that surround and inform journalists. Ensuring
that members of the media and those they trust are getting the latest,
high quality information is the best way to ensure that the public at
large receives the same.

***

Applecart can mine its Social Graph to assemble lists of employees of
restaurants, bars, movie theaters, and other businesses that have been
mandated to close during the COVID-19 crisis and make these lists
available to government agencies, as well as grocery stores,
pharmacies, and other businesses, who may be in need of extra labor
during a time of extraordinary demand.

***

Applecart can mine its Social Graph to identify a list of Americans
over the age of 65 and, for each, their closest neighbors under the
age of 40. Public and private sector actors looking to combat COVID-19
can then call or text the neighbors, in order to enlist them as
volunteers to procure and deliver food and medicine to their older
neighbors, while they are sheltering-in-place.

On December 1, 2020, Gordon forwarded

Whitmer’s chief of staff a PowerPoint summary on COVID political
messaging, “Changing the COVID Conversation,” put together by

Foundation, based on a survey of 1,100 Americans. They “tested
specific words, sentences, phrases, and attributes Americans need to
hear to change their behavior and stop the spread of the
coronavirus.” A significant part of the report analyzed
Democrat-vs.-Republican responses. For example, one of several

settled.”

Much of the Luntz Report deals with wordsmithing. A table
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=25036&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21pY2hpZ2FuLWhlYWx0aC1kaXJlY3Rvci1yb2JlcnQtZ29yZG9uLWFwcmlsLTIwMjEtcGctODIzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYwNDIzNDIzMQ==]

The survey
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=25037&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21pY2hpZ2FuLWhlYWx0aC1kaXJlY3Rvci1yb2JlcnQtZ29yZG9uLWFwcmlsLTIwMjEtcGctODE3Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYwNDIzNDIzMQ==]
of
1,100 people, which included an “oversample of 300 African
Americans,” found that there was a “chasm” between Republicans
and Democrats on COVID, and “In every possible way, Democrats and
Republicans think differently and act differently.” Luntz said they
“tested specific words, sentences, phrases, and attributes Americans
need to hear to change their behavior and stop the spread of the

important to you regarding COVID-19?” survey respondents outranked
“Health” to “Liberty” by 48% to 13%. Among African Americans,
54% responded “Health” and 6% said “Liberty.”

An April 2, 2020, email exchange
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=25043&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21pY2hpZ2FuLWhlYWx0aC1kaXJlY3Rvci1yb2JlcnQtZ29yZG9uLWFwcmlsLTIwMjEtcGdzLTY1Ny02NjIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjA0MjM0MjMx]
among
top Michigan government, National Guard and state police officials
shows heightened concern over the failure of Michigan to utilize Trump
administration-approved military personnel to help respond to
COVID-19, while other states had already brought in thousands of
troops. In one email, Major Gen. Paul Rogers, head of the Michigan
National Guard, tells his colleagues:

This is a critical need. We must act quickly to request support on
behalf of Michigan. I actually thought this request went out
yesterday.
After listing states where thousands of military troops had been sent
to other states, he notes: “Michigan has Zero!”

Gordon then forwards the exchange on to JoAnne Huls, Whitmer’s chief
of staff, saying:

You should read this chain. Big Problem. Just discussing with General
Rogers. Wondering if you want to intervene with MSP [Michigan State
Police] tonight.
These documents show the ugly and cynical approach by Michigan state
officials to COVID – using tax dollars to buy secrecy and manipulate
public opinion.

JUDICIAL WATCH REPRESENTS CENTER FOR MEDICAL PROGRESS AGAINST HHS OVER
THE USE OF HUMAN FETAL TISSUE

We are representing The Center for Medical Progress
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=25052&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2VudGVyZm9ybWVkaWNhbHByb2dyZXNzLm9yZy9hYm91dC11cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MDQyMzQyMzE=]
(CMP), which
filed two separate Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuits against
the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for grant
applications related to the use of human fetal tissue (_Center for
Medical Progress v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=25053&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NtcC12LWhocy1icmFpbi10aXNzdWUtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwNjQxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYwNDIzNDIzMQ==]
(No. 1:21-cv-00641)); (_Center for Medical Progress v. U.S. Department
of Health and Human Services_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=25060&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NtcC12LWhocy1mZXRhbC10aXNzdWUtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwNjQyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYwNDIzNDIzMQ==]
(No. 1:21-cv-00642)). CMP is responsible for the 2015 series of
undercover videos exposing the harvesting and trafficking of aborted
fetal body parts at Planned Parenthood.

The first lawsuit was filed after HHS had provided 214 pages of
records in response to an April 28, 2020, FOIA request and withheld
additional records without giving any reason for the withholdings. The
FOIA request asked for grant applications related to two separate
Brain and Tissue Repositories
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=25055&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9uZXVyb2Jpb2JhbmsubmloLmdvdi9hYm91dC1iZXN0LXByYWN0aWNlcy8/c2VhcmNoX3Rlcm09cmVwb3NpdG9yaWVzJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjA0MjM0MjMx].

The second lawsuit was filed after HHS failed to respond to an April
28, 2020, FOIA request seeking the grant applications for a University
of Pittsburgh “tissue hub and collection site,” a mouse and human
kidney development project that utilizes human tissue and a molecular
mapping project that uses human tissue to map cell types along the
urethra.

Both requests identified each grant application by project name and by
project number and included both the name of the Project Investigator
(PI) and a hyperlink to the location on NIH’s website where an
abstract of the project could be found.

David Daleiden, founder and executive director of The Center for
Medical Progress, stated, “The full truth about barbaric
government-sponsored experiments on aborted children has yet to be
revealed to the American people who have been forced to subsidize it.
When the facts are uncovered, federal courts are recognizing ‘There
is reason to question the lawfulness of the transactions’ where
aborted baby body parts are traded like widgets on an assembly line.
We are proud to stand with Judicial Watch in seeking transparency and
accountability for taxpayer-funded trafficking of aborted fetuses.”

Let me add that when the federal government conducts shocking research
that involves human fetal tissue, Americans have a right to know basic
information about where these human remains come from, who is
providing them, how they are acquired and why the research is
necessary.

Here’s some important background.

In March 2021, a federal court ordered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=22382&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYWJvcnRlZC1mZXR1c2VzLWluZm9ybWF0aW9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYwNDIzNDIzMQ==]
HHS to release additional information about its purchases of organs
harvested from aborted human fetuses. The court also found “there is
reason to question” whether the transactions violate federal law
barring the sale of fetal organs.

In May 2021, we announced that we had uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=22536&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaHVtYW5pemVkLW1pY2UtZmRhLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYwNDIzNDIzMQ==]
records from the FDA showing the agency spent tens of thousands of
taxpayer dollars to buy human fetal tissue from California-based
Advanced Bioscience Resources (ABR). The tissue was used in creating
“humanized mice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=17668&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXd0bi5jb20vY2F0aG9saWNpc20vbGlicmFyeS9mZXRhbC1leHBlcmltZW50YXRpb24tZnJhbmtlbnN0ZWluLXJldmlzaXRlZC05NjEwXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYwNDIzNDIzMQ==
to test “biologic drug products.” The records show the agency
ordered shipments to be “fresh; shipped on wet ice.”

In June 2020, we released records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=19379&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZmRhLWh1bWFuaXplZC1taWNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYwNDIzNDIzMQ==]
showing the FDA between 2012 and 2018 entered into eight contracts
worth $96,370 with Advanced Bioscience Resources (ABR) to acquire
“fresh and never frozen” tissue from 1st and 2nd trimester aborted
fetuses for use in creating humanized mice for ongoing research. In
February 2020, we made public
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=17891&F=T&]
additional humanized mice records.

In June 2019, The Trump administration announced
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=25056&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9mYXMub3JnL3NncC9jcnMvbWlzYy9JTjExMTM2LnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYwNDIzNDIzMQ==]
that it would
“discontinue intramural research (i.e., internal) projects involving
fetal tissue from elective abortions at the National Institutes of
Health (NIH), and (would) add additional ethics review for new
extramural research (i.e., external) involving such tissue.”

In August 2020, _Science Magazine_ reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=25057&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2NpZW5jZW1hZy5vcmcvbmV3cy8yMDIwLzA4L25ldy11cy1ldGhpY3MtYm9hcmQtcmVqZWN0cy1tb3N0LWh1bWFuLWZldGFsLXRpc3N1ZS1yZXNlYXJjaC1wcm9wb3NhbHM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MDQyMzQyMzE=]
that the Trump administration’s Human Fetal Tissue Research Ethics
Advisory Board
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=25094&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9vc3Aub2QubmloLmdvdi9iaW90ZWNobm9sb2d5L25paC1odW1hbi1mZXRhbC10aXNzdWUtcmVzZWFyY2gtZXRoaWNzLWFkdmlzb3J5LWJvYXJkLyUyM21lbWJlcnM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MDQyMzQyMzE=]
rejected 13 of 14 studies that used human fetal tissue. The Biden
administration announced on April 16, 2021, that it would again allow
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55857&L=25059&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2NpZW5jZW1hZy5vcmcvbmV3cy8yMDIxLzA0L2JpZGVuLWFkbWluaXN0cmF0aW9uLXNjcmFwcy1odW1hbi1mZXRhbC10aXNzdWUtcmVzZWFyY2gtcmVzdHJpY3Rpb25zP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNjA0MjM0MjMx]
taxpayer funding of this controversial research.

The Center for Medical Progress is a group of citizen journalists
dedicated to monitoring and reporting on medical ethics and advances.
They are concerned about contemporary bioethical issues that impact
human dignity, and oppose any interventions, procedures,
and experiments that exploit the unequal legal status of any class of
human beings. They envision a world in which medical practice and
biotechnology ally with and serve the goods of human nature and do not
destroy, disfigure, or work against them.

Until next week ...
